We capture complete tokens here\\n          // so the final-render path can fall back to them if normal extraction finds nothing.\\n          // Inline/fenced code examples must stay inert, matching final token extraction.\\n          const captured = captureRelayDelegateTokensFromText(session.buffer, session._streamingDelegates ?? []);\\n          session._streamingDelegates = captured.length ? captured : undefined;\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      case \\\"tool_call\\\": {\\n        const title = (up.title as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n        const startId = up.toolCallId as string | undefined;\\n        if (startId) (session._toolTitles ??= new Map()).set(startId, title);\\n        session.toolLog.push(`🔧 ${title}`);\\n        session._toolInFlight = true;\\n        petState(\\\"tool\\\", title);\\n        session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      case \\\"tool_call_update\\\": {\\n        const status = up.status as string | undefined;\\n        const updId = up.toolCallId as string | undefined;\\n        // tool_call_update carries the opaque toolCallId, not the name. Resolve\\n        // the human-readable title captured at tool_call start; fall back to an\\n        // inline title if the adapter provides one, else \\\"tool\\\".\\n        const toolName =\\n          (updId ? session._toolTitles?.get(updId) : undefined) ??\\n          (up.title as string) ??\\n          \\\"tool\\\";\\n        if (status === \\\"completed\\\") {\\n          session.toolLog.push(`✅ ${toolName}`);\\n          session._toolInFlight = false;\\n          session._consecutiveToolFails = 0;\\n          logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\", { name: toolName, status: \\\"completed\\\" }, { chatId: session.chatId });\\n          if (updId) session._toolTitles?.delete(updId);\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        } else if (status === \\\"failed\\\") {\\n          session.toolLog.push(`❌ ${toolName}`);\\n          session._toolInFlight = false;\\n          session._consecutiveToolFails++;\\n          logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\", { name: toolName, status: \\\"failed\\\" }, { chatId: session.chatId });\\n          if (updId) session._toolTitles?.delete(updId);\\n          if (session._consecutiveToolFails >= 2) {\\n            session.toolLog.push(\\n              `⚠️ [Reflexion hint] ${session._consecutiveToolFails} consecutive tool failures. ` +\\n              `STOP and diagnose: what assumption is wrong? Try a different approach.`\\n            );\\n          }\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      default:\\n        // Ignore plan/user_message_chunk/etc. for the bridge.\\n        break;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  resetTurn(session: ChatSession) {\\n    session.buffer = \\\"\\\";\\n    session.thinkingBuffer = undefined;\\n    session.toolLog = [];\\n    session.stderrTail = \\\"\\\";\\n    session._toolInFlight = false;\\n    session._streamingDelegates = undefined;\\n    session._toolTitles?.clear();\",\"numLines\":80,\"startLine\":340,\"totalLines\":519}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\event-log.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Event Log — 狀態轉移持久化記錄\\n * \\n * 可查、可審計、可回放。30 天滾動清理。\\n */\\n\\nimport { appendFileSync, existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from \\\"fs\\\";\\nimport { dirname, join } from \\\"path\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type EventType =\\n  | \\\"session_start\\\"\\n  | \\\"session_end\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_start\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_step\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_done\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_cancel\\\"\\n  | \\\"specialist_spawn\\\"\\n  | \\\"specialist_done\\\"\\n  | \\\"scheduler_fire\\\"\\n  | \\\"tool_call\\\"\\n  | \\\"error\\\";\\n\\nexport interface StateEvent {\\n  ts: string;\\n  type: EventType;\\n  chatId?: number;\\n  userId?: number;\\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst EVENT_LOG_PATH = join(config.memoryDir, \\\"events.jsonl\\\");\\nconst RETENTION_DAYS = 30;\\n\\n// ─── Core Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * 寫入一筆 event\\n */\\nexport function logEvent(\\n  type: EventType,\\n  payload: Record<string, unknown> = {},\\n  opts: { chatId?: number; userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n    const events = lines\\n      .slice(-n)\\n      .map((line) => {\\n        try {\\n          return JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        } catch {\\n          return null;\\n        }\\n      })\\n      .filter((e): e is StateEvent => e !== null);\\n\\n    return events;\\n  } catch {\\n    return [];\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定類型的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByType(type: EventType, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.type === type).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定 chat 的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByChat(chatId: number, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.chatId === chatId).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 滾動清理：刪除超過 RETENTION_DAYS 的 events\\n * \\n * 建議在 /dream 時呼叫\\n */\\nexport function rotateEventLog(): { deleted: number; kept: number } {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) {\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n\\n    const cutoff = new Date();\\n    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - RETENTION_DAYS);\\n    const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n    const kept: string[] = [];\\n    let deleted = 0;\\n\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      try {\\n        const event = JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        if (event.ts >= cutoffStr) {\\n          kept.push(line);\\n        } else {\\n          deleted++;\\n        }\\n      } catch {\\n        // 無法解析的行直接丟棄\\n        deleted++;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    writeFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, kept.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + (kept.length ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\"), \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n\\n    return { deleted, kept: kept.length };\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to rotate:\\\", err);\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 統計過去 days 天的 tool_call 使用次數，依工具名稱聚合。\\n *\\n * 回傳依使用次數由多到少排序的陣列；total 為總呼叫數、failed 為失敗數。\\n */\\nexport function getToolUsageStats(days: number = 7): {\\n  byTool: Array<{ name: string; total: number; failed: number }>;\\n  total: number;\\n  failed: number;\\n} {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n  const counts = new Map<string, { total: number; failed: number }>();\\n  let total = 0;\\n  let failed = 0;\\n\\n  for (const e of getRecentEvents(10000)) {\\n    if (e.type !== \\\"tool_call\\\" || e.ts < cutoffStr) continue;\\n    const name = (e.payload?.name as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n    const isFail = e.payload?.status === \\\"failed\\\";\\n    const cur = counts.get(name) ?? { total: 0, failed: 0 };\\n    cur.total++;\\n    if (isFail) cur.failed++;\\n    counts.set(name, cur);\\n    total++;\\n    if (isFail) failed++;\\n  }\\n\\n  const byTool = [...counts.entries()]\\n    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, total: v.total, failed: v.failed }))\\n    .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total);\\n\\n  return { byTool, total, failed };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 取得 event log 統計\\n */\\nexport function getEventLogStats(): {\\n  totalEvents: number;\\n  oldestEvent?: string;\\n  newestEvent?: string;\\n  byType: Record<string, number>;\\n} {\\n  const events = getRecentEvents(10000); // 讀取全部（最多 10000）\\n\\n  if (events.length === 0) {\\n    return { totalEvents: 0, byType: {} };\\n  }\\n\\n  const byType: Record<string, number> = {};\\n  for (const e of events) {\\n    byType[e.type] = (byType[e.type] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    totalEvents: events.length,\\n    oldestEvent: events[0]?.ts,\\n    newestEvent: events[events.length - 1]?.ts,\\n    byType,\\n  };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":218,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":218}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>

attachment.content:
- deep-research: Deep research harness — fan-out web searches, fetch sources, adversarially verify claims, synthesize a cited report. - When the user wants a deep, multi-source, fact-checked research report on any topic. BEFORE invoking, check if the question is specific enough to research directly — if underspecified (e.g., "what car to buy" without budget/use-case/region), ask 2-3 clarifying questions to narrow scope. Then pass the refined question as args, weaving the answers in.
- update-config: Use this skill to configure the Claude Code harness via settings.json. Automated behaviors ("from now on when X", "each time X", "whenever X", "before/after X") require hooks configured in settings.json - the harness executes these, not Claude, so memory/preferences cannot fulfill them. Also use for: permissions ("allow X", "add permission", "move permission to"), env vars ("set X=Y"), hook troubleshooting, or any changes to settings.json/settings.local.json files. Examples: "allow npm commands", "add bq permission to global settings", "move permission to user settings", "set DEBUG=true", "when claude stops show X". For simple settings like theme/model, suggest the /config command.
- keybindings-help: Use when the user wants to customize keyboard shortcuts, rebind keys, add chord bindings, or modify ~/.claude/keybindings.json. Examples: "rebind ctrl+s", "add a chord shortcut", "change the submit key", "customize keybindings".
- verify: Verify that a code change actually does what it's supposed to by running the app and observing behavior. Use when asked to verify a PR, confirm a fix works, test a change manually, check that a feature works, or validate local changes before pushing.
- code-review: Review the current diff for correctness bugs and reuse/simplification/efficiency cleanups at the given effort level (low/medium: fewer, high-confidence findings; high→max: broader coverage, may include uncertain findings). Pass --comment to post findings as inline PR comments, or --fix to apply the findings to the working tree after the review.
- simplify: Review the changed code for reuse, simplification, efficiency, and altitude cleanups, then apply the fixes. Quality only — it does not hunt for bugs; use /code-review for that.
- fewer-permission-prompts: Scan your transcripts for common read-only Bash and MCP tool calls, then add a prioritized allowlist to project .claude/settings.json to reduce permission prompts.
- loop: Run a prompt or slash command on a recurring interval (e.g. /loop 5m /foo). Omit the interval to let the model self-pace. - When the user wants to set up a recurring task, poll for status, or run something repeatedly on an interval (e.g. "check the deploy every 5 minutes", "keep running /babysit-prs"). Do NOT invoke for one-off tasks.
- schedule: Create, update, list, or run scheduled cloud agents (routines) that execute on a cron schedule. - When the user wants to schedule a recurring cloud agent, set up automated tasks, create a cron job for Claude Code, or manage their scheduled agents/routines. Also use when the user wants a one-time scheduled run ("run this once at 3pm", "remind me to check X tomorrow").
- claude-api: Reference for the Claude API / Anthropic SDK — model ids, pricing, params, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, token counting, model migration.
TRIGGER — read BEFORE opening the target file; don't skip because it "looks like a one-liner" — whenever: the prompt names Claude/Anthropic in any form (Claude, Anthropic, Fable, Opus, Sonnet, Haiku, `anthropic`, `@anthropic-ai`, `claude-*`, `us.anthropic.*`, `[1m]`); the user asks about an LLM (pricing/model choice/limits/caching) — never answer from memory; OR the task is LLM-shaped with provider unstated (agent/MCP/tool-definition/multi-agent/RAG/LLM-judge/computer-use; generate/summarize/extract/classify/rewrite/converse over NL; debugging refusals/cutoffs/streaming/tool-calls/tokens).
SKIP only when another provider is being worked on (overrides all triggers): OpenAI/GPT/Gemini/Llama/Mistral/Cohere/Ollama named in the query; OR `grep -rE 'openai|langchain_openai|google.generativeai|genai|mistralai|cohere|ollama'` over the project hits (run this grep FIRST if no provider named — don't Read the file).
- run: Launch and drive this project's app to see a change working. Use when asked to run, start, or screenshot the app, or to confirm a change works in the real app (not just tests). First looks for a project skill that already covers launching the app; otherwise falls back to built-in patterns per project type (CLI, server, TUI, Electron, browser-driven, library).
- init: Initialize a new CLAUDE.md file with codebase documentation
- review: Review a GitHub pull request; for your working diff use /code-review
- security-review: Complete a security review of the pending changes on the current branch

statSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport path from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\nimport { detectSkillDir } from \\\"./memory.js\\\";\\n\\nexport interface SkillCandidate {\\n  pattern: string;          // representative keyword/phrase\\n  count: number;            // how many sessions it appeared in\\n  examples: string[];       // up to 3 representative user messages\\n}\\n\\nconst DAYS_WINDOW = 7;\\nconst MIN_SESSIONS = 3;    // must appear in ≥3 different sessions\\nconst STOP_WORDS = new Set([\\n  \\\"的\\\", \\\"了\\\", \\\"是\\\", \\\"在\\\", \\\"我\\\", \\\"有\\\", \\\"和\\\", \\\"就\\\", \\\"不\\\", \\\"人\\\", \\\"都\\\", \\\"一\\\", \\\"這\\\",\\n  \\\"那\\\", \\\"要\\\", \\\"會\\\", \\\"對\\\", \\\"也\\\", \\\"說\\\", \\\"到\\\", \\\"she\\\",\\n  \\\"we\\\", \\\"they\\\", \\\"me\\\", \\\"him\\\", \\\"her\\\", \\\"us\\\", \\\"them\\\", \\\"my\\\", \\\"your\\\",\\n  \\\"his\\\", \\\"its\\\", \\\"our\\\", \\\"their\\\", \\\"and\\\", \\\"but\\\", \\\"or\\\", \\\"not\\\", \\\"no\\\",\\n  \\\"好\\\", \\\"嗯\\\", \\\"ok\\\", \\\"yes\\\", \\\"no\\\", \\\"push\\\", \\\"繼續\\\", \\\"done\\\",\\n]);\\n\\n/** Extract user messages from a session markdown file. */\\nfunction extractUserMessages(content: string): string[] {\\n  const msgs: string[] = [];\\n  const blocks = content.split(/^### 👤 User/m);\\n  for (let i = 1; i < blocks.length; i++) {\\n    // Take text until next ### header\\n    const end = blocks[i].indexOf(\\\"\\\\n### \\\");\\n    const raw = end > 0 ? blocks[i].slice(0, end) : blocks[i];\\n    // Strip metadata lines (Intent hint, Skill routing, timestamps, relay captions)\\n    const lines = raw.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(l =>\\n      !l.startsWith(\\\"[\\\") && !l.startsWith(\\\"---\\\") && !l.startsWith(\\\"### \\\") &&\\n      !/^\\\\s*\\\\(.*[上下]午\\\\d/.test(l) &&\\n      !/^\\\\s*這是委派/.test(l) &&\\n      l.trim().length > 2\\n    );\\n    const msg = lines.join(\\\" \\\").trim();\\n    if (msg.length > 5 && msg.length < 200) msgs.push(msg);\\n  }\\n  return msgs;\\n}\\n\\n/** Tokenize a message into meaningful bigrams. */\\nfunction extractBigrams(msg: string): string[] {\\n  const words = msg.toLowerCase()\\n    .replace(/[^\\\\w\\\\u4e00-\\\\u9fff\\\\s]/g, \\\" \\\")\\n    .split(/\\\\s+/)\\n    .filter(w => w.length > 1 && !STOP_WORDS.has(w));\\n  const bigrams: string[] = [];\\n  for (let i = 0; i < words.length - 1; i++) {\\n    bigrams.push(`${words[i]} ${words[i + 1]}`);\\n  }\\n  // Also include single meaningful words ≥3 chars\\n  for (const w of words) {\\n    if (w.length >= 3) bigrams.push(w);\\n  }\\n  return bigrams;\\n}\\n\\n/** Load existing skill keywords for comparison. */\\nfunction loadSkillKeywords(): Set<string> {\\n  const skillDir = detectSkillDir();\\n  const keywords = new Set<string>();\\n  if (!existsSync(skillDir)) return keywords;\\n  for (const entry of readdirSync(skillDir, { withFileTypes: true })) {\\n    if (!entry.isDirectory()) continue;\\n    // Add the skill folder name as a keyword\\n    keywords.add(entry.name.replace(/^ms-/, \\\"\\\").replace(/-/g, \\\" \\\"));\\n    // Read SKILL.md description for additional keywords\\n    const skillFile = path.join(skillDir, entry.name, \\\"SKILL.md\\\");\\n    if (!existsSync(skillFile)) continue;\\n    const content = readFileSync(skillFile, \\\"utf8\\\").slice(0, 500);\\n    const descMatch = content.match(/description:\\\\s*(.+)/);\\n    if (descMatch) {\\n      const desc = descMatch[1].toLowerCase();\\n      // Extract Chinese/English words from description\\n      const descWords = desc.replace(/[^\\\\w\\\\u4e00-\\\\u9fff\\\\s]/g, \\\" \\\").split(/\\\\s+/)\\n        .filter(w => w.length >= 3);\\n      for (const w of descWords) keywords.add(w);\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return keywords;\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * Scan recent sessions and produce skill candidates.\\n * Returns patterns that appear in ≥3 sessions with no matching skill.\\n */\\nexport function suggestSkills(): SkillCandidate[] {\\n  const sessDir = path.join(config.memoryDir, \\\"sessions\\\");\\n  if (!existsSync(sessDir)) return [];\\n\\n  const cutoff = Date.now() - DAYS_WINDOW * 86400_000;\\n  const files = readdirSync(sessDir)\\n    .filter(f => f.startsWith(\\\"session-\\\") && f.endsWith(\\\".md\\\"))\\n    .filter(f => {\\n      const full = path.join(sessDir, f);\\n      try {\\n        return statSync(full).mtimeMs >= cutoff;\\n      } catch { return false; }\\n    });\\n\\n  // Count bigrams across sessions (deduplicated per session)\\n  const bigramSessions = new Map<string, Set<string>>(); // bigram → set of session filenames\\n  const bigramExamples = new Map<string, string[]>();     // bigram → example messages\\n\\n  for (const file of files) {\\n    const content = readFileSync(path.join(sessDir, file), \\\"utf8\\\");\\n    const msgs = extractUserMessages(content);\\n    const sessionBigrams = new Set<string>();\\n    for (const msg of msgs) {\\n      for (const bg of extractBigrams(msg)) {\\n        if (!sessionBigrams.has(bg)) {\\n          sessionBigrams.add(bg);\\n          if (!bigramSessions.has(bg)) bigramSessions.set(bg, new Set());\\n          bigramSessions.get(bg)!.add(file);\\n          if (!bigramExamples.has(bg)) bigramExamples.set(bg, []);\\n          const ex = bigramExamples.get(bg)!;\\n          if (ex.length < 3) ex.push(msg.slice(0, 100));\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Filter: ≥MIN_SESSIONS occurrences\\n  const skillKeywords = loadSkillKeywords();\\n  const candidates: SkillCandidate[] = [];\\n\\n  for (const [bigram, sessions] of bigramSessions) {\\n    if (sessions.size < MIN_SESSIONS) continue;\\n    // Skip if matches an existing skill keyword\\n    if (skillKeywords.has(bigram)) continue;\\n    // Skip if any word in the bigram is a skill keyword\\n    const words = bigram.split(\\\" \\\");\\n    if (words.some(w => skillKeywords.has(w))) continue;\\n\\n    candidates.push({\\n      pattern: bigram,\\n      count: sessions.size,\\n      examples: bigramExamples.get(bigram) ?? [],\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  // Sort by frequency descending, take top 10\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.count - a.count);\\n  return candidates.slice(0, 10);\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":159,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":159}}"</outcome>

userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n    const events = lines\\n      .slice(-n)\\n      .map((line) => {\\n        try {\\n          return JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        } catch {\\n          return null;\\n        }\\n      })\\n      .filter((e): e is StateEvent => e !== null);\\n\\n    return events;\\n  } catch {\\n    return [];\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定類型的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByType(type: EventType, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.type === type).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定 chat 的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByChat(chatId: number, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.chatId === chatId).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 滾動清理：刪除超過 RETENTION_DAYS 的 events\\n * \\n * 建議在 /dream 時呼叫\\n */\\nexport function rotateEventLog(): { deleted: number; kept: number } {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) {\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n\\n    const cutoff = new Date();\\n    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - RETENTION_DAYS);\\n    const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n    const kept: string[] = [];\\n    let deleted = 0;\\n\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      try {\\n        const event = JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        if (event.ts >= cutoffStr) {\\n          kept.push(line);\\n        } else {\\n          deleted++;\\n        }\\n      } catch {\\n        // 無法解析的行直接丟棄\\n        deleted++;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    writeFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, kept.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + (kept.length ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\"), \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n\\n    return { deleted, kept: kept.length };\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to rotate:\\\", err);\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 統計過去 days 天的 tool_call 使用次數，依工具名稱聚合。\\n *\\n * 回傳依使用次數由多到少排序的陣列；total 為總呼叫數、failed 為失敗數。\\n */\\nexport function getToolUsageStats(days: number = 7): {\\n  byTool: Array<{ name: string;     <fact>Event log tracks tool_call events with name and status (completed/failed)</fact>
    <fact>Event log supports 30-day retention with rotation via rotateEventLog()</fact>
  </facts>

The event logging system (event-log.ts) provides the persistence layer with JSONL format, supporting queries by type, chat, and time window, with tool_call events tracking both success and failure counts per tool name.</narrative>

<observation>
  <type>discovery</type>
  <title>Tool Tracking and Session Update Flow Architecture</title>
  <subtitle>Session state tracks tool execution via toolLog array, _toolTitles map, and consecutive failure counter for reflexion hints</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>ChatSession maintains toolLog string array with emoji-prefixed entries (🔧 start, ✅ success, ❌ fail)</fact>
    <fact>_toolTitles Map resolves opaque toolCallId to human-readable tool names during tool_call_update events</fact>
    <fact>_consecutiveToolFails counter triggers reflexion hint after 2 consecutive failures</fact>
    <fact>applyUpdate method is central dispatcher for SessionUpdate events from provider layer</fact>
    <fact>SessionUpdate events include agent_message_chunk, agent_thought_chunk, tool_call, and tool_call_update types</fact>
    <fact>Usage metadata is opportunistically captured from update._meta.usage or update.usage fields</fact>
    <fact>Memory infrastructure uses config.memoryDir for sessions, artifacts, wiki, and shared directories</fact>
    <fact>Local LLM detection via detectLlamaCpp() checks /v1/models endpoint with 3-second timeout</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Deep dive into sessionManager.ts revealed the tool tracking architecture used for monitoring agent activity. The system maintains three parallel tracking mechanisms: toolLog (user-visible chronological log with emoji status), _toolTitles (internal map for resolving tool call IDs to names), and _consecutiveToolFails (failure counter triggering reflexion prompts). All tool events flow through the applyUpdate() method, which listens to provider SessionUpdate events and dispatches to appropriate handlers. The tool_call event captures the initial tool name and ID, while tool_call_update resolves the ID back to the name for completion/failure logging. This architecture provides the foundation for post-tool hook implementation, as tool execution state is already centralized through the update dispatcher. The reflexion hint mechanism (activated at ≥2 failures) demonstrates existing intervention patterns that could be extended with custom hooks.</narrative>

    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>

'（未提供需求字串——請從 .claude-loop/artifacts/ 或對話脈絡推斷，若無則回報需要需求輸入）')\\n\\n// ── 承重核注入片段（每個設計 agent 都帶）──\\nconst LOADBEARING = `\\n【承重核要求 — 必須遵守】\\n1. 事實求證（認知驗證）：任何「X 是 Y / 系統現在如何」的事實斷言，先分級證據：\\n   🟢 A 級（檔:行原文）/ 🟡 B 級（間接）/ 🔴 反例檢查（若真應見X·若假應見Y·實際Z）。\\n   只有 A 級或 B 級+反例通過才可當設計前提；弱證據必須標「待驗證」，不可當既成事實設計。\\n2. 因果鏈（依賴影響）：設計觸及既有程式碼時，標出受影響的連動點（grep 呼叫者窮舉），\\n   呼叫者=0 的修改點要警示（可能有 inline 繞過）。\\n3. false,\\n  required: ['existingArchitecture', 'constraints', 'unknowns', 'factClaims'],\\n  properties: {\\n    existingArchitecture: { type: 'string', description: '既有系統相關結構（若 greenfield 則說明）' },\\n    constraints: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' } },\\n    unknowns: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string' }, description: '需求中未指定、需澄清的點' },\\n    factClaims: { type: 'array', items: { unknowns。\\n${LOADBEARING}\\n回報：既有架構摘要 / 約束 / unknowns / 你做的事實斷言及證據級。`,\\n  { label: 'explore', phase: 'Explore', schema: CONTEXT_SCHEMA }\\n)\\nconst CTX = JSON.stringify(ctx)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Propose')\\n\\nconst DESIGN_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['approach', 'modules', 'behaviorContracts', 'tradeoffs', 'rippleImpact'],\\n  properties: {\\n    approach: { type: 'string', description: '此方案的核心取向（一句話）' },\\n    modules: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', description: '模組/檔案 + 職責' } },\\n    behaviorContracts: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', description: 'BC-x：可驗證的行為契約' } },\\n    tradeoffs: { type: 'string', description: '此方案的取捨與最大風險' },\\n    rippleImpact: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', description: '因果鏈：觸及的既有連動點' } },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\nconst angles = [\\n  { key: 'mvp-first', brief: 'MVP 優先：最小可行、最少新增、最大複用既有。' },\\n  { key: 'robustness-first', brief: '健壯優先：邊界/錯誤處理/可擴展性優先，接受多一點結構。' },\\n  { key: 'simplicity-first', brief: '簡單優先：資深工程師視角，砍掉一切非必要抽象，KISS/YAGNI。' },\\n]\\n\\nconst proposals = (await parallel(angles.map(a => () =>\\n  agent(\\n    `你是架構設計 agent（${a.key} 視角）：${a.brief}\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索結果：${CTX}\\n產出一個完整架構方案：核心取向 / 模組與職責 / BC-x 行為契約（≥ 2，可驗證）/ 取捨與風險 / 因果鏈觸及的既有連動點。\\n${LOADBEARING}`,\\n    { label: `propose:${a.key}`, phase: 'Propose', schema: DESIGN_SCHEMA }\\n  )\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Adversarial')\\n\\nconst JUDGE_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['rankings', 'fatalFlaws', 'recommendation'],\\n  properties: {\\n    rankings: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['approach', 'score', 'why'], properties: { approach: { type: 'string' }, score: { type: 'number' }, why: { type: 'string' } } } },\\n    fatalFlaws: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', description: '任一方案的致命缺陷' } },\\n    recommendation: { type: 'string', description: '推薦哪個方案為基底 + 該嫁接其他方案的哪些亮點' },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\n// 對每個方案派 skeptic 可維護性陷阱）。預設懷疑，找不到才說沒有。\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(p)}\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索結果：${CTX}`,\\n    { label: `refute:${angles[i]?.key || i}`, phase: 'Adversarial' }\\n  )\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\nconst judgment = await agent(\\n  `你是設計評審團。根據 ${proposals.length} 個方案 + 各自的 skeptic 批評，評分排名、列出跨方案的致命缺陷、推薦基底方案並指出該嫁接哪些亮點。\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(proposals)}\\n批評：${JSON.stringify(critiques)}`,\\n  { label: 'judge-panel', phase: 'Adversarial', schema: JUDGE_SCHEMA }\\n)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Synthesize')\\n\\nconst spec = await agent(\\n  `你是首席架構師，產出最終設計規格（繁中，直接落檔到 .claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md）。\\n從評審推薦的基底方案綜合，嫁接亞軍亮點，吸收 skeptic 指出的缺陷做修正。\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索：${CTX}\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(proposals)}\\n評審：${JSON.stringify(judgment)}\\n\\n設計規格須含：目標 / 模組與職責 / BC-x 行為契約（可驗證，編號）/ 因果鏈（觸及的既有連動點 + 影響決策）/ 取捨與風險 / 學習查詢結果（若有讀到 .claudedocs/records/問題追蹤.md 長期警惕模式）。\\n${LOADBEARING}\\n用 Write 把規格寫入 .claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md（目錄不存在先建），並在回報摘要設計要點 + 殘餘風險。`,\\n  { label: 'synthesize-spec', phase: 'Synthesize' }\\n)\\n\\nreturn { spec, judgment }\\n\"}"</parameters>

=>\\n  agent(\\n    `你是架構設計 agent（${a.key} 視角）：${a.brief}\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索結果：${CTX}\\n產出一個完整架構方案：核心取向 / 模組與職責 / BC-x 行為契約（≥ 2，可驗證）/ 取捨與風險 / 因果鏈觸及的既有連動點。\\n${LOADBEARING}`,\\n    { label: `propose:${a.key}`, phase: 'Propose', schema: DESIGN_SCHEMA }\\n  )\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Adversarial')\\n\\nconst JUDGE_SCHEMA = {\\n  type: 'object', additionalProperties: false,\\n  required: ['rankings', 'fatalFlaws', 'recommendation'],\\n  properties: {\\n    rankings: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'object', additionalProperties: false, required: ['approach', 'score', 'why'], properties: { approach: { type: 'string' }, score: { type: 'number' }, why: { type: 'string' } } } },\\n    fatalFlaws: { type: 'array', items: { type: 'string', description: '任一方案的致命缺陷' } },\\n    recommendation: { type: 'string', description: '推薦哪個方案為基底 + 該嫁接其他方案的哪些亮點' },\\n  },\\n}\\n\\n// 對每個方案派 skeptic 找致命缺陷（perspective-diverse），再 judge-panel 評分\\nconst critiques = (await parallel(proposals.map((p, i) => () =>\\n  agent(\\n    `你是設計缺陷 skeptic。盡力找出以下架構方案的致命缺陷（過度設計 / 遺漏邊界 / 因果鏈漏接 / 事實前提錯誤 / 可維護性陷阱）。預設懷疑，找不到才說沒有。\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(p)}\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索結果：${CTX}`,\\n    { label: `refute:${angles[i]?.key || i}`, phase: 'Adversarial' }\\n  )\\n))).filter(Boolean)\\n\\nconst judgment = await agent(\\n  `你是設計評審團。根據 ${proposals.length} 個方案 + 各自的 skeptic 批評，評分排名、列出跨方案的致命缺陷、推薦基底方案並指出該嫁接哪些亮點。\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(proposals)}\\n批評：${JSON.stringify(critiques)}`,\\n  { label: 'judge-panel', phase: 'Adversarial', schema: JUDGE_SCHEMA }\\n)\\n\\n// ============================================================\\nphase('Synthesize')\\n\\nconst spec = await agent(\\n  `你是首席架構師，產出最終設計規格（繁中，直接落檔到 .claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md）。\\n從評審推薦的基底方案綜合，嫁接亞軍亮點，吸收 skeptic 指出的缺陷做修正。\\n需求：「${REQUIREMENT}」\\n探索：${CTX}\\n方案：${JSON.stringify(proposals)}\\n評審：${JSON.stringify(judgment)}\\n\\n設計規格須含：目標 / 模組與職責 / BC-x 行為契約（可驗證，編號）/ 因果鏈（觸及的既有連動點 + 影響決策）/ 取捨與風險 / 學習查詢結果（若有讀到 .claudedocs/records/問題追蹤.md 長期警惕模式）。\\n${LOADBEARING}\\n用 Write 把規格寫入 .claude-loop/artifacts/P1-design-spec.md（目錄不存在先建），並在回報摘要設計要點 + 殘餘風險。`,\\n  { label: 'synthesize-spec', phase: 'Synthesize' }\\n)\\n\\nreturn { spec, judgment }\\n\"}"</parameters>

Read 2026-06-30T02:34:28.932Z G:\AI\telegram-kiro-bridge-main "{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\docs\\\\post-tool-hooks-proposal.html\"}" "{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\docs\\\\post-tool-hooks-proposal.html\",\"content\":\"\\n\\n\\n\\n\\nPostToolUse Hooks — 比較與改善方案\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n

PostToolUse Hooks — 比較與改善方案

\\n

telegram-kiro-bridge vs Claude Code / ECC 的 tool 觀測機制對比，以及 3 個漸進改善方案

\\n\\n

§1 現況比較

\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
維度Claude Code (PostToolUse)ECC continuous-learning-v2我們的 Bridge（現狀）
架構外掛式：settings.json 註冊 shell commandShell hook 腳本寫入 observations.jsonl，背景 agent 讀取分析硬寫在 tool-loop.ts 的 callback + sessionManager.ts 狀態追蹤
觸發方式matcher pattern（*、Write、Bash）PreToolUse + PostToolUse 雙 hookonToolEnd(name, output, isError) callback，無 matcher 過濾
可擴充性高 任意外部腳本高 觀測+分析分離低 改 TS source 才能加邏輯
資料保存由腳本自行決定observations.jsonl → instincts YAMLtool log（記憶體內，session 結束即丟）+ event-log.jsonl（僅 8 種事件）
學習回饋無（純攔截，不會改 prompt）instinct → confidence → evolve to skillconsecutiveToolFails ≥2 → reflexion hint 注入 preamble
效能開銷每次 tool call spawn 一個 process每次 tool call append file + 定期跑 background agent（Haiku）幾乎零（in-process callback）
\\n\\n

§2 我們已有的「隱性 hooks」

\\n\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
位置觸發時機做了什麼等價於
tool-loop.ts
onToolEnd		每個 tool 完成後emit tool_call_update 事件PostToolUse notification
tool-loop.ts
主迴圈		tool result 注入後detectProjectHints() → 注入 CodeGraph/AI.md hintPostToolUse content enrichment
codegraph-enricher.tscodegraph_* tool 完成後附加 domain 資訊到 resultPostToolUse 特定 tool 增強
sessionManager.ts
handleUpdate		tool_call_update 事件consecutive fail tracking → reflexion hintPostToolUse error monitoring
tool-loop.ts
repetition detect		同一 tool call 出現 ≥3 次強制中斷 loop + 要求總結PostToolUse loop guard
\\n
\\n\\n

§3 差距分析（我們缺什麼）

\\n\\n
\\n
\\n

🔴 缺少的能力

\\n
    \\n
  • 無法觀測 tool 使用模式（哪些 tool 常用、哪些組合出現）
    • \\n
  • 無法從 tool 歷史自動學習（ECC 的 instinct extraction）
    • \\n
  • 無法動態改變 tool 行為（例如自動 truncate 特定 tool 的過長 output）
    • \\n
  • 無法以外部腳本擴充（必須改 source code）
    • \\n
  • tool_call 事件不進 event-log.jsonl（只有 session/goal/relay 等 8 類）
    • \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n

🟢 已經做得好的

\\n
    \\n
  • 零額外開銷（in-process callback vs spawn shell）
    • \\n
  • reflexion hint 已覆蓋「連續失敗自動糾正」
    • \\n
  • repetition detection 防 loop 空轉
    • \\n
  • CodeGraph/AI.md hint 自動注入不需使用者干預
    • \\n
  • RTK shell rewrite 已是 PreToolUse 等價機制
    • \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n

§4 三個漸進方案

\\n\\n\\n

方案 A：Tool Usage Log（最小改動，立即可用）

\\n
\\n

概念：把 tool call 記錄寫入 event-log.jsonl，讓 /dream 能分析 tool 使用模式。

\\n\\n
\\n tool 完成\\n →\\n append event-log.jsonl\\n →\\n /dream 掃描分析\\n →\\n 產出 tool-usage-report\\n
\\n\\n
\\n// sessionManager.ts — handleUpdate 中 tool_call_update 區塊\\ncase \\\"tool_call_update\\\": {\\n  const name = (up.toolCallId as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n  const status = up.status as string;\\n  \\n  // 現有邏輯...\\n  \\n  // 新增：記錄到 event-log\\n  logEvent({\\n    type: \\\"tool_call\\\",\\n    name,\\n    status, // \\\"completed\\\" | \\\"failed\\\"\\n    sessionId: session.sessionId,\\n    ts: Date.now(),\\n  });\\n  break;\\n}\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
優點缺點改動量
~10 行，零 breaking change；立即有數據可分析；/utilityreport 可延伸顯示 tool 熱力圖只是被動紀錄，不改變行為；分析延遲到 /dream 執行時~15 行
\\n
\\n\\n\\n

方案 B：Pluggable PostTool Hooks（中等改動，通用化）

\\n
\\n

概念：在 tool-loop.ts 加入 hook registry，讓各模組自行註冊 post-tool handler。

\\n\\n
\\n// tool-loop.ts 新增 interface\\nexport interface PostToolHook {\\n  /** Glob-style matcher: \\\"*\\\", \\\"shell\\\", \\\"codegraph_*\\\", \\\"mcp__memory__*\\\" */\\n  matcher: string;\\n  /** Called after tool execution. Can modify output or inject hints. */\\n  handler: (ctx: {\\n    name: string;\\n    args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    output: string;\\n    isError: boolean;\\n    messages: ChatMessage[];  // 可讀可寫\\n  }) => void | Promise<void>;\\n}\\n\\n// 在 runToolLoop 參數加入\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  // ...existing...\\n  postToolHooks?: PostToolHook[];\\n}\\n
\\n\\n

執行點（executeToolCalls 完成後）：

\\n\\n
\\n// tool-loop.ts — 在 results append 到 messages 之後\\nfor (const r of results) {\\n  messages.push({ role: \\\"tool\\\", tool_call_id: r.id, content: r.output });\\n  \\n  // 跑 matching hooks\\n  for (const hook of (opts.postToolHooks ?? [])) {\\n    if (matchGlob(hook.matcher, r.name)) {\\n      await hook.handler({ name: r.name, args: r.args, output: r.output, \\n                           isError: r.isError, messages });\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n
\\n\\n

內建 hooks 遷移（把現有硬寫邏輯變成 hook）：

\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n
現有功能遷移為 hookmatcher
CodeGraph enrichmentcodegraphEnrichHookcodegraph_*
AI.md / CodeGraph hint injectionprojectHintHook*
Tool usage loggingtoolLogHook*
RTK shell rewrite（這是 PreTool，留原位）—
\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
優點缺點改動量
通用擴充點：未來加新 hook 不改 tool-loop 核心；邏輯解耦好維護需要 glob matcher 實作（~15 行）；hook 順序需定義（priority?）~80 行
\\n
\\n\\n\\n

方案 C：Instinct Observer（大改動，ECC 式學習）

\\n
\\n

概念：PostTool hook 除了紀錄，還會定期跑 local LLM 分析模式、自動產出 instinct → 累積到 skill propose。

\\n\\n
\\n tool call 完成\\n →\\n observations.jsonl\\n →\\n local LLM 分析
(每 N 條觸發)\\n →\\n instincts/
pattern YAML\\n →\\n confidence ≥ 0.5
→ SKILL_PROPOSE\\n
\\n\\n
\\n// 新檔案：src/tool-observer.ts\\ninterface Observation {\\n  ts: number;\\n  toolName: string;\\n  args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  output: string;        // truncated to 500 chars\\n  isError: boolean;\\n  sessionId: string;\\n  precedingTools: string[]; // 前 3 個 tool（捕捉 combo pattern）\\n}\\n\\ninterface Instinct {\\n  id: string;\\n  trigger: string;       // \\\"when using shell for git operations\\\"\\n  pattern: string;       // \\\"always use --no-pager flag\\\"\\n  confidence: number;    // 0.3 – 0.9\\n  occurrences: number;\\n  lastSeen: string;      // ISO date\\n}\\n\\n// /dream 新步驟：instinct-evolve\\n// 掃 observations.jsonl → local LLM cluster → 更新 instincts.json\\n// confidence ≥ 0.5 + occurrences ≥ 5 → 自動 SKILL_PROPOSE\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
優點缺點改動量
真正的自我學習閉環；利用現有 local LLM 基礎設施；自動從 tool 使用中萃取 skill複雜度高；依賴 local LLM 可用性（fallback 時降級為純統計）；需新增 /dream 步驟~300 行 + 新檔
\\n
\\n\\n

§5 推薦路徑

\\n\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
階段方案前提預計效果
現在A — Tool Usage Log無立即有數據；下次 /dream 就能分析 tool 使用熱點
下週B — Pluggable HooksA 的數據驗證哪些 tool 值得加特化邏輯架構解耦；未來加 hook 零改 core
觀望C — Instinct ObserverB 穩定 + local LLM 常駐 + 確認有足夠 observation 量自動從 tool 使用中「長出」新 skill
\\n\\n

\\n理由：A→B→C 是漸進式驗證。A 先證明「紀錄 tool call 有分析價值」，B 再把架構準備好讓 C 不需改 core code 就能掛上去。跳過 A 直接做 C 的風險是：花 300 行寫完後發現 tool call 模式太雜沒有可萃取的 instinct。\\n

\\n
\\n\\n

§6 方案 A 具體改動清單

\\n\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
檔案改動行數
src/event-log.ts新增 \\\"tool_call\\\" 到 EventType union+1
src/sessionManager.tstool_call_update case 裡加一行 logEvent()+5
src/commands/misc.ts/utilityreport 增加 tool 使用統計區塊（optional）+15
\\n

總計 ~20 行，無 breaking change，不影響 ACP session 行為。

\\n
\\n\\n
\\nGenerated 2026-06-27 · telegram-kiro-bridge PostToolUse hooks 研究\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n\",\"numLines\":378,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":378}}"

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\provider\\\\tool-loop.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Tool Loop — iterative tool call execution for DirectProvider.\\n *\\n * Safety guards:\\n * 1. Iteration limit (default 25)\\n * 2. Repetition detection (same tool+args ≥3 times → break)\\n * 3. Parallel tool execution (Promise.all for multi-tool responses)\\n */\\nimport { createHash } from \\\"node:crypto\\\";\\nimport { existsSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport { resolve, dirname } from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport type { McpPool } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { enrichCodegraphResult } from \\\"./codegraph-enricher.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types shared with adapters ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ChatMessage {\\n  role: \\\"system\\\" | \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\" | \\\"tool\\\";\\n  content: string | ContentBlock[];\\n  tool_call_id?: string;\\n  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ContentBlock {\\n  type: \\\"text\\\" | \\\"tool_use\\\" | \\\"tool_result\\\";\\n  text?: string;\\n  id?: string;\\n  name?: string;\\n  input?: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  tool_use_id?: string;\\n  content?: string;\\n  is_error?: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolCall {\\n  id: string;\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: { name: string; arguments: string };\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolDef {\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: {\\n    name: string;\\n    description?: string;\\n    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n/** Adapter must implement this to be used by the tool loop. */\\nexport interface LlmAdapter {\\n  chat(messages: ChatMessage[], opts: {\\n    tools?: ToolDef[];\\n    onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n    onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  }): Promise<{ message: ChatMessage; stopReason: string }>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Tool Loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  maxIterations?: number;\\n  /** Context window size — enables mid-loop overflow protection. */\\n  contextWindow?: number;\\n  /** Max chars per tool result (truncated if exceeded). Default: unlimited. */\\n  maxToolResultChars?: number;\\n  onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onToolStart?: (name: string, input: string) => void;\\n  onToolEnd?: (name: string, result: string, isError: boolean) => void;\\n}\\n\\nconst DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS = 25;\\nconst REPETITION_THRESHOLD = 3;\\nconst RTK_ENABLED = [\\\"true\\\", \\\"1\\\"].includes(process.env.RTK_SHELL_REWRITE ?? \\\"\\\");\\n\\nexport async function runToolLoop(\\n  adapter: LlmAdapter,\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  messages: ChatMessage[],\\n  tools: ToolDef[],\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions = {},\\n): Promise<{ stopReason: string }> {\\n  const maxIter = opts.maxIterations ?? DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS;\\n  const recentCalls: string[] = []; // hashes of recent tool calls\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxIter; i++) {\\n    // Mid-loop context overflow protection: if messages exceed 85% of context window, break early\\n    if (opts.contextWindow) {\\n      const currentTokens = estimateMessagesTokens(messages);\\n      if (currentTokens > opts.contextWindow * 0.85) {\\n        console.warn(`[tool-loop] context overflow guard: ${currentTokens} tokens > 85% of ${opts.contextWindow} — breaking at iteration ${i}`);\\n        messages.push({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: \\\"[System: Context budget nearly exhausted. Summarize progress and respond now.]\\\",\\n        });\\n        const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n        messages.push(final.message);\\n        return { stopReason: \\\"context_overflow\\\" };\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const { message, stopReason } = await adapter.chat(messages, {\\n      tools,\\n      onText: opts.onText,\\n      onThinking: opts.onThinking,\\n    });\\n\\n    messages.push(message);\\n\\n    // Extract tool calls (OpenAI format)\\n    const toolCalls = message.tool_calls;\\n    if (!toolCalls || toolCalls.length === 0) {\\n      return { stopReason };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Repetition detection\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n      const hash = hashToolCall(tc.function.name, tc.function.arguments);\\n      recentCalls.push(hash);\\n    }\\n    if (detectRepetition(recentCalls)) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: \\\"[System: Tool call loop detected — same call repeated multiple times. Please summarize your progress and respond to the user.]\\\",\\n      });\\n      // One more call without tools to get a text response\\n      const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n      messages.push(final.message);\\n      return { stopReason: \\\"tool_loop_break\\\" };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Execute tool calls (parallel for different servers, serial for same)\\n    const results = await executeToolCalls(toolCalls, pool, opts);\\n\\n    // Append tool results\\n    for (const r of results) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"tool\\\",\\n        tool_call_id: r.id,\\n        content: r.output,\\n      });\\n    }\\n\\n    // Project auto-detect: hint agent about CodeGraph index and AI.md\\n    const usedCodegraph = toolCalls.some(tc => tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\"));\\n    const { codegraph: cgProjects, aiMd: aiProjects } = detectProjectHints(toolCalls);\\n    const hints: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if (!usedCodegraph && cgProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = cgProjects.map(p => `\\\"${p}\\\"`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`CodeGraph index detected at ${paths}. Iteration limit (default 25)\\n * 2. Repetition detection (same tool+args ≥3 times → break)\\n * 3. Parallel tool execution (Promise.all for multi-tool responses)\\n */\\nimport { createHash } from \\\"node:crypto\\\";\\nimport { existsSync } from \\\"node:fs\\\";\\nimport { resolve, dirname } from \\\"node:path\\\";\\nimport type { McpPool } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { enrichCodegraphResult } from \\\"./codegraph-enricher.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types shared with adapters ────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ChatMessage {\\n  role: \\\"system\\\" | \\\"user\\\" | \\\"assistant\\\" | \\\"tool\\\";\\n  content: string | ContentBlock[];\\n  tool_call_id?: string;\\n  tool_calls?: ToolCall[];\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ContentBlock {\\n  type: \\\"text\\\" | \\\"tool_use\\\" | \\\"tool_result\\\";\\n  text?: string;\\n  id?: string;\\n  name?: string;\\n  input?: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  tool_use_id?: string;\\n  content?: string;\\n  is_error?: boolean;\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolCall {\\n  id: string;\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: { name: string; arguments: string };\\n}\\n\\nexport interface ToolDef {\\n  type: \\\"function\\\";\\n  function: {\\n    name: string;\\n    description?: string;\\n    parameters: Record<string, unknown>;\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n/** Adapter must implement this to be used by the tool loop. */\\nexport interface LlmAdapter {\\n  chat(messages: ChatMessage[], opts: {\\n    tools?: ToolDef[];\\n    onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n    onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  }): Promise<{ message: ChatMessage; stopReason: string }>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Tool Loop ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  maxIterations?: number;\\n  /** Context window size — enables mid-loop overflow protection. */\\n  contextWindow?: number;\\n  /** Max chars per tool result (truncated if exceeded). Default: unlimited. */\\n  maxToolResultChars?: number;\\n  onText?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onThinking?: (chunk: string) => void;\\n  onToolStart?: (name: string, input: string) => void;\\n  onToolEnd?: (name: string, result: string, isError: boolean) => void;\\n}\\n\\nconst DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS = 25;\\nconst REPETITION_THRESHOLD = 3;\\nconst RTK_ENABLED = [\\\"true\\\", \\\"1\\\"].includes(process.env.RTK_SHELL_REWRITE ?? \\\"\\\");\\n\\nexport async function runToolLoop(\\n  adapter: LlmAdapter,\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  messages: ChatMessage[],\\n  tools: ToolDef[],\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions = {},\\n): Promise<{ stopReason: string }> {\\n  const maxIter = opts.maxIterations ?? DEFAULT_MAX_ITERATIONS;\\n  const recentCalls: string[] = []; // hashes of recent tool calls\\n\\n  for (let i = 0; i < maxIter; i++) {\\n    // Mid-loop context overflow protection: if messages exceed 85% of context window, break early\\n    if (opts.contextWindow) {\\n      const currentTokens = estimateMessagesTokens(messages);\\n      if (currentTokens > opts.contextWindow * 0.85) {\\n        console.warn(`[tool-loop] context overflow guard: ${currentTokens} tokens > 85% of ${opts.contextWindow} — breaking at iteration ${i}`);\\n        messages.push({\\n          role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n          content: \\\"[System: Context budget nearly exhausted. Summarize progress and respond now.]\\\",\\n        });\\n        const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n        messages.push(final.message);\\n        return { stopReason: \\\"context_overflow\\\" };\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const { message, stopReason } = await adapter.chat(messages, {\\n      tools,\\n      onText: opts.onText,\\n      onThinking: opts.onThinking,\\n    });\\n\\n    messages.push(message);\\n\\n    // Extract tool calls (OpenAI format)\\n    const toolCalls = message.tool_calls;\\n    if (!toolCalls || toolCalls.length === 0) {\\n      return { stopReason };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Repetition detection\\n    for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n      const hash = hashToolCall(tc.function.name, tc.function.arguments);\\n      recentCalls.push(hash);\\n    }\\n    if (detectRepetition(recentCalls)) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: \\\"[System: Tool call loop detected — same call repeated multiple times. Please summarize your progress and respond to the user.]\\\",\\n      });\\n      // One more call without tools to get a text response\\n      const final = await adapter.chat(messages, { onText: opts.onText, onThinking: opts.onThinking });\\n      messages.push(final.message);\\n      return { stopReason: \\\"tool_loop_break\\\" };\\n    }\\n\\n    // Execute tool calls (parallel for different servers, serial for same)\\n    const results = await executeToolCalls(toolCalls, pool, opts);\\n\\n    // Append tool results\\n    for (const r of results) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"tool\\\",\\n        tool_call_id: r.id,\\n        content: r.output,\\n      });\\n    }\\n\\n    // Project auto-detect: hint agent about CodeGraph index and AI.md\\n    const usedCodegraph = toolCalls.some(tc => tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\"));\\n    const { codegraph: cgProjects, aiMd: aiProjects } = detectProjectHints(toolCalls);\\n    const hints: string[] = [];\\n\\n    if (!usedCodegraph && cgProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = cgProjects.map(p => `\\\"${p}\\\"`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`CodeGraph index detected at ${paths}. Use codegraph_context/codegraph_impact instead of grep for call-chain analysis.`);\\n      for (const p of cgProjects) hintedCodegraph.add(p);\\n    }\\n    if (aiProjects.length > 0) {\\n      const paths = aiProjects.map(p => `${p}/AI.md`).join(\\\", \\\");\\n      hints.push(`AI.md found at ${paths} — read it for project conventions before making changes.`);\\n      for (const p of aiProjects) hintedAiMd.add(p);\\n    }\\n    if (hints.length > 0) {\\n      messages.push({\\n        role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n        content: `[System hint: ${hints.join(\\\" | \\\")}]`,\\n      });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // Hit iteration limit\\n  messages.push({\\n    role: \\\"assistant\\\",\\n    content: \\\"[System: Maximum tool call iterations reached. 1];\\n  let count = 0;\\n  for (let i = recent.length - 1; i >= 0 && i >= recent.length - 5; i--) {\\n    if (recent[i] === last) count++;\\n  }\\n  return count >= REPETITION_THRESHOLD;\\n}\\n\\ninterface ToolResult {\\n  id: string;\\n  output: string;\\n}\\n\\nasync function executeToolCalls(\\n  toolCalls: ToolCall[],\\n  pool: McpPool,\\n  opts: ToolLoopOptions,\\n): Promise<ToolResult[]> {\\n  const results: ToolResult[] = [];\\n  const maxChars = opts.maxToolResultChars;\\n\\n  // Group by server to serialize calls to the same server\\n  // but parallelize across different servers\\n  const tasks = toolCalls.map(async (tc) => {\\n    const name = tc.function.name;\\n    let args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    try {\\n      args = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments);\\n    } catch {\\n      args = {};\\n    }\\n\\n    opts.onToolStart?.(name, tc.function.arguments);\\n\\n    // RTK auto-rewrite: prefix shell commands with `rtk` for compressed output\\n    if (RTK_ENABLED && name === \\\"shell\\\" && typeof args.command === \\\"string\\\") {\\n      args.command = applyRtkPrefix(args.command);\\n    }\\n\\n    try {\\n      const result = await pool.callTool(name, args);\\n      \\n      // Codegraph enrichment: 附加 domain 資訊和 wiki 連結\\n      if (name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\")) {\\n        const projectPath = args.projectPath as string | undefined;\\n        enrichCodegraphResult(result, projectPath);\\n      }\\n      \\n      let output = serializeToolResult(result.content);\\n      // Truncate tool output for context-constrained models\\n      if (maxChars && output.length > maxChars) {\\n        output = output.slice(0, maxChars) + `\\\\n...[truncated, ${output.length - maxChars} chars omitted]`;\\n      }\\n      opts.onToolEnd?.(name, output.slice(0, 200), !!result.isError);\\n      return { id: tc.id, output };\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      const errMsg = `Error executing ${name}: ${(err as Error).message}`;\\n      opts.onToolEnd?.(name, errMsg, true);\\n      return { id: tc.id, output: errMsg };\\n    }\\n  });\\n\\n  // Execute all in parallel (MCP SDK handles its own serialization per-connection)\\n  const settled = await Promise.all(tasks);\\n  results.push(...settled);\\n  return results;\\n}\\n\\nfunction serializeToolResult(content: unknown[]): string {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(content)) return String(content);\\n  return content\\n    .map((block: any) => {\\n      if (block.type === \\\"text\\\") return block.text;\\n      return JSON.stringify(block);\\n    })\\n    .join(\\\"\\\\n\\\");\\n}\\n\\n\\n/** Prefix eligible shell commands with `rtk` for compressed output. Skip interactive/piped commands. */\\nfunction applyRtkPrefix(cmd: string): string {\\n  const trimmed = cmd.trimStart();\\n  // Already has rtk prefix\\n  if (trimmed.startsWith(\\\"rtk \\\")) return cmd;\\n  // Skip: piped chains, interactive commands, redirections\\n  if (/[|><]/.test(cmd)) return cmd;\\n  // Only rewrite known rtk-friendly commands\\n  const rtkCmds = [\\\"git status\\\", \\\"git diff\\\", \\\"git log\\\", \\\"grep \\\", \\\"cargo test\\\", \\\"npm test\\\", \\\"npx tsc\\\"];\\n  if (rtkCmds.some((c) => trimmed.startsWith(c))) {\\n    return `rtk ${trimmed}`;\\n  }\\n  return cmd;\\n}\\n\\n/** Rough token estimate for mid-loop overflow check. */\\nfunction estimateMessagesTokens(messages: ChatMessage[]): number {\\n  let chars = 0;\\n  for (const m of messages) {\\n    const c = m.content;\\n    chars += (typeof c === \\\"string\\\" ? c.length : JSON.stringify(c ?? \\\"\\\").length) + 10;\\n  }\\n  return Math.ceil(chars / 4);\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Project auto-detect hints (CodeGraph + AI.md) ─────────────────────────\\n\\n/** Projects where we already emitted a hint this loop (avoid spamming). */\\nconst hintedCodegraph = new Set<string>();\\nconst hintedAiMd = new Set<string>();\\n\\n/**\\n * Extract project root paths from tool call args (read/grep/glob paths).\\n * Walk up to 3 levels from the path to find .codegraph/ or AI.md.\\n */\\nfunction detectProjectHints(toolCalls: ToolCall[]): { codegraph: string[]; aiMd: string[] } {\\n  const cgFound: string[] = [];\\n  const aiFound: string[] = [];\\n\\n  for (const tc of toolCalls) {\\n    if (tc.function.name.startsWith(\\\"codegraph_\\\")) continue;\\n\\n    let args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    try { args = JSON.parse(tc.function.arguments); } catch { continue; }\\n\\n    const candidates: string[] = [];\\n    if (typeof args.path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(args.path);\\n    if (typeof args.file_path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(args.file_path);\\n    if (typeof args.pattern === \\\"string\\\" && /^[A-Z]:[/\\\\\\\\]/.test(args.pattern)) candidates.push(args.pattern);\\n    if (Array.isArray(args.operations)) {\\n      for (const op of args.operations as any[]) {\\n        if (typeof op?.path === \\\"string\\\") candidates.push(op.path);\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    for (const p of candidates) {\\n      let dir = resolve(p.replace(/\\\\//g, \\\"\\\\\\\\\\\"));\\n      if (/\\\\.\\\\w+$/.test(dir)) dir = dirname(dir);\\n      for (let depth = 0; depth < 4; depth++) {\\n        const normalized = dir.replace(/\\\\\\\\/g, \\\"/\\\");\\n        if (!hintedCodegraph.has(normalized) && existsSync(resolve(dir, \\\".codegraph\\\"))) {\\n          cgFound.push(normalized);\\n        }\\n        if (!hintedAiMd.has(normalized) && existsSync(resolve(dir, \\\"AI.md\\\"))) {\\n          aiFound.push(normalized);\\n        }\\n        // Stop walking if we found both at this level\\n        if (cgFound.includes(normalized) && aiFound.includes(normalized)) break;\\n        const parent = dirname(dir);\\n        if (parent === dir) break;\\n        dir = parent;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  return { codegraph: [...new Set(cgFound)], aiMd: [...new Set(aiFound)] };\\n}\\n\\n/** Reset hints between sessions (call on session start). */\\nexport function resetCodegraphHints(): void {\\n  hintedCodegraph.clear();\\n  hintedAiMd.clear();\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":347,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":347}}"</outcome>

content.text:
<observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>Multi-Agent Design Workflow Launched for Post-Tool Hook Architecture</title>
  <subtitle>Four-phase adversarial design process initiated to validate dual-tier observer pattern for automatic skill extraction from tool usage</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Workflow dev-design launched with run ID wf_89ec203d-719 and task ID whyv1flv1</fact>
    <fact>Design target is adapting Plan B (pluggable post-tool hooks) to achieve Plan C (instinct → SKILL_PROPOSE from tool usage)</fact>
    <fact>Dual-tier architecture proposed: Tier A sequential observer in sessionManager (both ACP/Direct paths), Tier B rich observer in tool-loop.ts (DirectProvider only)</fact>
    <fact>Five behavior contracts defined: BC-1 (Direct deduplication), BC-2 (ACP seq-only), BC-3 (local-llm fallback), BC-4 (confidence thresholds), BC-5 (fail-silent bypass)</fact>
    <fact>Phase 1 scope limited to observer implementation only, analyzer deferred to Phase 2</fact>
    <fact>Workflow phases: Explore (existing architecture) → Propose (3 judge-panel perspectives: MVP-first, robustness-first, simplicity-first) → Adversarial (skeptic refutation) → Synthesize (final design spec)</fact>
    <fact>Loadbearing requirements injected into all agents: fact verification with evidence grading, causal chain analysis, honest boundaries</fact>
    <fact>Critical design challenges flagged: BC-1 depends on provider type accessibility, observations.jsonl vs event-log.ts extension decision, args sanitization strategy, ACP extraction ceiling value assessment</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Primary session launched a comprehensive multi-agent design workflow to resolve the architecture for post-tool hooks that enable automatic skill extraction from tool usage patterns. The workflow implements a four-phase adversarial design process where exploration agents map existing architecture, three independent design agents (MVP-first, robustness-first, simplicity-first) propose competing solutions, skeptic agents attempt to refute each proposal, and a judge panel synthesizes the final design spec. The target architecture is a dual-tier observer pattern: Tier A captures sequential tool usage (name+status) at sessionManager.tool_call_update for both ACP and DirectProvider paths, while Tier B captures rich observations (args+output) from tool-loop.ts executeToolCalls for DirectProvider only. Five behavior contracts (BC-1 through BC-5) define testable requirements including Direct-path deduplication, ACP seq-only constraints, local-llm graceful degradation, confidence thresholds, and fail-silent error handling. The design explicitly acknowledges physical limitations (ACP runs tool loops externally, making args/output inaccessible) and focuses Phase 1 implementation on data collection only, deferring the analyzer component to Phase 2 once real observation data exists. Critical design risks flagged for adversarial verification include the BC-1 deduplication dependency on provider type accessibility, the value proposition of Tier A given ACP's combo-level-only signal ceiling, and the phase-splitting strategy.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
    <concept>trade-off</concept>
    <concept>why-it-exists</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

<summary>
  <request>User asked about modification plan B for project hooks; primary session launched comprehensive multi-agent design workflow to architect the solution</request>
  <investigated>Existing tool tracking architecture in sessionManager.ts and tool-loop.ts; provider update flow; reflexion pattern precedents; memory infrastructure paths; local LLM detection mechanisms</investigated>
  <learned>Tool execution state flows through centralized SessionUpdate dispatcher in applyUpdate method; DirectProvider and ACP paths converge at tool_call_update event handler; DirectProvider has access to tool args/output via tool-loop.ts, while ACP runs external tool loops making rich data inaccessible; existing reflexion hint pattern demonstrates automated intervention precedent</learned>
  <completed>Launched dev-design workflow (Run ID: wf_89ec203d-719, Task ID: whyv1flv1) with 4-phase adversarial design process to validate dual-tier observer architecture for post-tool hooks enabling automatic skill extraction from tool usage patterns</completed>
  <next_steps>Workflow executing four phases: Explore (map existing architecture) → Propose (3 competing designs via judge-panel: MVP-first, robustness-first, simplicity-first) → Adversarial (skeptic refutation of each proposal) → Synthesize (final design spec with BC-1 through BC-5 behavior contracts, causal chain analysis, and phased implementation strategy); awaiting completion notification to deliver design specification</next_steps>
  <notes>Design workflow explicitly addresses five critical challenges through adversarial verification: BC-1 deduplication dependency on provider type accessibility with fallback strategy, observations.jsonl vs event-log.ts extension decision, args sanitization for secrets/paths, phase-splitting justification (Phase 1 observers-only vs earlier analyzer integration), and honest assessment of whether ACP's combo-level-only signal ceiling undermines Tier A value proposition. Workflow uses loadbearing requirements (fact verification with evidence grading A/B/weak, causal chain with caller enumeration, honest boundaries) injected into all agents to prevent unfounded assumptions.</notes>

PostToolUse Hooks — 比較與改善方案

\\n

telegram-kiro-bridge vs Claude Code / ECC 的 tool 觀測機制對比，以及 3 個漸進改善方案

\\n\\n

§1 現況比較

\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
維度Claude Code (PostToolUse)ECC continuous-learning-v2我們的 Bridge（現狀）
架構外掛式：settings.json 註冊 shell commandShell hook 腳本寫入 observations.jsonl，背景 agent 讀取分析硬寫在 tool-loop.ts 的 callback + sessionManager.ts 狀態追蹤
觸發方式matcher pattern（*、Write、Bash）PreToolUse + PostToolUse 雙 hookonToolEnd(name, output, isError) callback，無 matcher 過濾
可擴充性高 任意外部腳本高 觀測+分析分離低 改 TS source 才能加邏輯
資料保存由腳本自行決定observations.jsonl → instincts YAMLtool log（記憶體內，session 結束即丟）+ event-log.jsonl（僅 8 種事件）
學習回饋無（純攔截，不會改 prompt）instinct → confidence → evolve to skillconsecutiveToolFails ≥2 → reflexion hint 注入 preamble
效能開銷每次 tool call spawn 一個 process每次 tool call append file + 定期跑 background agent（Haiku）幾乎零（in-process callback）
\\n\\n

§2 我們已有的「隱性 hooks」

\\n\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
位置觸發時機做了什麼等價於
tool-loop.ts
onToolEnd		每個 tool 完成後emit tool_call_update 事件PostToolUse notification
tool-loop.ts
主迴圈		tool result 注入後detectProjectHints() → 注入 CodeGraph/AI.md hintPostToolUse content enrichment
codegraph-enricher.tscodegraph_* tool 完成後附加 domain 資訊到 resultPostToolUse 特定 tool 增強
sessionManager.ts

tool-loop.ts
repetition detect		同一 tool call 出現 ≥3 次強制中斷 loop + 要求總結PostToolUse loop guard
\\n
\\n\\n

§3 差距分析（我們缺什麼）

\\n\\n
\\n
\\n

🔴 缺少的能力

\\n
    \\n
  • 無法觀測 tool 使用模式（哪些 tool 常用、哪些組合出現）
    • \\n
  • 無法從 tool 歷史自動學習（ECC 的 instinct extraction）
    • \\n
  • 無法動態改變 tool 行為（例如自動 truncate 特定 tool 的過長 output）
    • \\n
  • 無法以外部腳本擴充（必須改 source code）
    • \\n
  • tool_call 事件不進 event-log.jsonl（只有 session/goal/relay 等 8 類）
    • \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n

🟢 已經做得好的

\\n
    \\n
  • 零額外開銷（in-process callback vs spawn shell）
    • \\n
  • reflexion hint 已覆蓋「連續失敗自動糾正」
    • \\n
  • repetition detection 防 loop 空轉
    • \\n
  • CodeGraph/AI.md hint 自動注入不需使用者干預
    • \\n
  • RTK shell rewrite 已是 PreToolUse 等價機制
    • \\n
\\n
\\n
\\n\\n

§4 三個漸進方案

\\n\\n\\n

方案 A：Tool Usage Log（最小改動，立即可用）

\\n
\\n

概念：把 tool call 記錄寫入 event-log.jsonl，讓 /dream 能分析 tool 使用模式。

\\n\\n
\\n tool 完成\\n →\\n append event-log.jsonl\\n →\\n /dream 掃描分析\\n →\\n 產出 tool-usage-report\\n
\\n\\n
\\n// sessionManager.ts — handleUpdate 中 tool_call_update 區塊\\ncase \\\"tool_call_update\\\": {\\n  const name = (up.toolCallId as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n  const status = up.status as string;\\n  \\n  // 現有邏輯...\\n  \\n  // 新增：記錄到 event-log\\n  logEvent({\\n    type: \\\"tool_call\\\",\\n    name,\\n    status, // \\\"completed\\\" | \\\"failed\\\"\\n    sessionId: session.sessionId,\\n    ts: Date.now(),\\n  });\\n  break;\\n}\\n
\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
優點缺點改動量
~10 行，零 breaking change；立即有數據可分析；/utilityreport 可延伸顯示 tool 熱力圖只是被動紀錄，不改變行為；分析延遲到 /dream 執行時~15 行
\\n
\\n\\n\\n

方案 B：Pluggable PostTool Hooks（中等改動，通用化）

\\n
\\n

概念：在 tool-loop.ts 加入 hook registry，讓各模組自行註冊 post-tool handler。

\\n\\n
\\n// tool-loop.ts 新增 interface\\nexport interface PostToolHook {\\n  /** Glob-style matcher: \\\"*\\\", \\\"shell\\\", \\\"codegraph_*\\\", \\\"mcp__memory__*\\\" */\\n  matcher: string;\\n  /** Called after tool execution. Can modify output or inject hints. */\\n  handler: (ctx: {\\n    name: string;\\n    args: Record<string, unknown>;\\n    output: string;\\n    isError: boolean;\\n    messages: ChatMessage[];  // 可讀可寫\\n  }) => void | Promise<void>;\\n}\\n\\n// 在 runToolLoop 參數加入\\nexport interface ToolLoopOptions {\\n  // ...existing...\\n  postToolHooks?: PostToolHook[];\\n}\\n
\\n\\n

執行點（executeToolCalls 完成後）：

\\n\\n
\\n// tool-loop.ts — 在 results append 到 messages 之後\\nfor (const r of results) {\\n  messages.push({ role: \\\"tool\\\", tool_call_id: r.id, content: r.output });\\n  \\n  // 跑 matching hooks\\n  for (const hook of (opts.postToolHooks ?? [])) {\\n    if (matchGlob(hook.matcher, r.name)) {\\n      await hook.handler({ name: r.name, args: r.args, output: r.output, \\n                           isError: r.isError, messages });\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n
\\n\\n

內建 hooks 遷移（把現有硬寫邏輯變成 hook）：

\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n
現有功能遷移為 hookmatcher
CodeGraph enrichmentcodegraphEnrichHookcodegraph_*
AI.md / CodeGraph hint injectionprojectHintHook*
Tool usage loggingtoolLogHook*
RTK shell rewrite（這是 PreTool，留原位）—
\\n\\n\\n\\n\\n \\n \\n \\n\\n
優點缺點改動量
通用擴充點：未來加新 hook 不改 tool-loop 核心；邏輯解耦好維護需要 glob matcher 實作（~15 行）；hook 順序需定義（priority?）~80 行
\\n
\\n\\n\\n

方案 C：Instinct Observer（大改動，ECC 式學習）

\\n
\\n

概念：PostTool hook 除了紀錄，還會定期跑 local LLM 分析模式、自動產出 instinct → 累積到 skill propose。
