subprocess).\\n * Manages its own MCP connections and tool loop.\\n */\\nimport { EventEmitter } from \\\"node:events\\\";\\nimport type { Provider, SessionUpdate, ProviderType } from \\\"./types.js\\\";\\nimport { McpPool, loadMcpConfigs, type ToolSchema } from \\\"./mcp-pool.js\\\";\\nimport { runToolLoop, type ChatMessage, type ToolDef } from \\\"./tool-loop.js\\\";\\nimport { compactIfNeeded } from \\\"./compaction.js\\\";\\nimport { detectLlamaCpp, localComplete } from \\\"../local-llm.js\\\";\\nimport { OpenAICompatAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/openai-compat.js\\\";\\nimport { OllamaNativeAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/ollama-native.js\\\";\\nimport { LlamaCppAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/llamacpp.js\\\";\\nimport { AnthropicAdapter } from \\\"./adapters/anthropic.js\\\";\\nimport type { LlmAdapter } from \\\"./tool-loop.js\\\";\\n\\nexport interface DirectProviderConfig {\\n  type: ProviderType;\\n  model: string;\\n  baseUrl: string;\\n  apiKey: string;\\n  /** System prompt (preamble). */\\n  systemPrompt?: string;\\n  /** Extra env vars passed to MCP server processes. */\\n  mcpEnv?: Record<string, string>;\\n  /** If set, only connect MCP servers whose names are in this list. */\\n  mcpServerFilter?: string[];\\n}\\n\\nexport class DirectProvider extends EventEmitter implements Provider {\\n  readonly name: string;\\n  private pool = new McpPool();\\n  private adapter: LlmAdapter;\\n  private messages: ChatMessage[] = [];\\n  private tools: ToolDef[] = [];\\n  private _closed = false;\\n  private _inflight = false;\\n  private contextWindow: number;\\n\\n  constructor(private cfg: DirectProviderConfig) {\\n    super();\\n    this.name = cfg.type;\\n    this.adapter = this.createAdapter();\\n    this.contextWindow = resolveContextWindow(cfg.type, cfg.model);\\n  }\\n\\n  private createAdapter(): LlmAdapter {\\n    if (this.cfg.type === \\\"anthropic\\\") {\\n      return new AnthropicAdapter({\\n        apiKey: this.cfg.apiKey,\\n        model: this.cfg.model,\\n        baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl || undefined,\\n      });\\n    }\\n    if (this.cfg.type === \\\"local\\\") {\\n      const llamaCppUrl = process.env.LLAMACPP_URL?.trim();\\n      if (llamaCppUrl) {\\n        // llama.cpp server: OpenAI-compatible /v1/chat/completions with <think> tag parsing\\n        console.log(`[direct] using llama.cpp server at ${llamaCppUrl}`);\\n        return new LlamaCppAdapter({ baseUrl: llamaCppUrl, model: this.cfg.model, timeoutMs: 300_000, contextWindow: this.contextWindow });\\n      }\\n      return new OllamaNativeAdapter({\\n        baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl.replace(/\\\\/v1$/, \\\"\\\"), // strip /v1 suffix\\n        model: this.cfg.model,\\n        numCtx: Number(process.env.LOCAL_NUM_CTX) || 32768,\\n      });\\n    }\\n    return new OpenAICompatAdapter({\\n      baseUrl: this.cfg.baseUrl,\\n      apiKey: this.cfg.apiKey,\\n      model: this.cfg.model,\\n      numCtx: undefined,\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Initialize MCP connections and prepare tool schemas. Returns a session ID. */\\n  async initialize(): Promise<string> {\\n    let configs = await loadMcpConfigs();\\n    if (this.cfg.mcpServerFilter) {\\n      const allow = new Set(this.cfg.mcpServerFilter);\\n      configs = Object.fromEntries(Object.entries(configs).filter(([k]) => allow.has(k)));\\n    }\\n    await this.pool.connectAll(configs, this.cfg.mcpEnv);\\n\\n    // Convert MCP tool schemas to OpenAI function format\\n    this.tools = this.pool.listTools().map(mcpToToolDef);\\n\\n    // Set system prompt\\n    if (this.cfg.systemPrompt) {\\n      this.messages.push({ role: \\\"system\\\", content: this.cfg.systemPrompt });\\n    }\\n\\n    const sessionId = `direct-${Date.now()}`;\\n    console.log(`[direct] initialized \\\"${this.name}\\\" (${this.cfg.model}) — ${this.tools.length} tools from ${this.pool.size} MCP servers`);\\n    return sessionId;\\n  }\\n\\n  async prompt(text: string): Promise<{ stopReason: string }> {\\n    if (this._closed) throw new Error(\\\"DirectProvider is closed\\\");\\n    if (this._inflight) throw new Error(\\\"Prompt already in progress\\\");\\n    this._inflight = true;\\n\\n    try {\\n      this.messages.push({ role: \\\"user\\\", content: text });\\n\\n      // Context compaction: prevent messages from exceeding model context window\\n      const isLocal = this.cfg.type === \\\"local\\\";\\n      const summarizer = await detectLlamaCpp()\\n        ? async (text: string) => localComplete(\\n            `Summarize this conversation concisely (keep key decisions, tool results, and user requests):\\\\n\\\\n${text.slice(0, 6000)}`,\\n            { maxTokens: 800 },\\n          )\\n        : undefined;\\n      await compactIfNeeded(this.messages, {\\n        contextWindow: this.contextWindow,\\n        threshold: isLocal ? 0.5 : 0.7,\\n        keepTurns: isLocal ? 3 : 5,\\n        summarize: summarizer,\\n      });\\n\\n      const result = await runToolLoop(this.adapter, this.pool, this.messages, this.tools, {\\n        ...(this.cfg.type === \\\"local\\\" ? {\\n          maxIterations: 8,\\n          contextWindow: this.contextWindow,\\n        } : {}),\\n        onText: (chunk) => {\\n          this.emitUpdate(\\\"agent_message_chunk\\\", { type: \\\"text\\\", text: chunk });\\n        },\\n        onThinking: (chunk) => {\\n          // Surface thinking text to user as blockquote during streaming.\\n          this.emitUpdate(\\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\", { type: \\\"text\\\", text: chunk });\\n        },\\n        onToolStart: (name, input) => {\\n          this.emitUpdate(\\\"tool_call\\\", { title: name });\\n        },\\n        onToolEnd: (name, output, isError) => {\\n          this.emitUpdate(\\\"tool_call_update\\\", {\\n            toolCallId: name,\\n            status: isError ? \\\"failed\\\" : \\\"completed\\\",\\n          });\\n        },\\n      });\\n\\n      return { stopReason: result.stopReason };\\n    } finally {\\n      this._inflight = false;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  cancel(): void {\\n    // For streaming HTTP, we'd need an AbortController. For now, just mark done.\\n    this._inflight = false;\\n  }\\n\\n  async close(): Promise<void> {\\n    this._closed = true;\\n    await this.pool.close();\\n    this.emit(\\\"exit\\\", 0);\\n  }\\n\\n  get isClosed(): boolean {\\n    return this._closed;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Emit a SessionUpdate event matching the ACP format so run-prompt.ts works unchanged. */\\n  private emitUpdate(sessionUpdate: string, extra: Record<string, unknown>) {\\n    // ACP format wraps message/thought chunks in a `content` field;\\n    // tool_call / tool_call_update fields sit at the top level.\\n    const isChunk = sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" || sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\";\\n    const update = isChunk\\n      ? { sessionUpdate, content: extra }\\n      : { sessionUpdate, ...extra };\\n    const u: SessionUpdate = { sessionId: \\\"direct\\\", update };\\n    this.emit(\\\"update\\\", u);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Helpers ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nfunction mcpToToolDef(schema: ToolSchema): ToolDef {\\n  return {\\n    type: \\\"function\\\",\\n    function: {\\n      name: schema.name,\\n      description: schema.description,\\n      parameters: schema.inputSchema,\\n    },\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n/** Resolve provider type to base URL. */\\nexport function resolveBaseUrl(type: ProviderType, ollamaUrl: string): string {\\n  switch (type) {\\n    case \\\"anthropic\\\": return \\\"https://api.anthropic.com\\\";\\n    case \\\"openai\\\": return \\\"https://api.openai.com/v1\\\";\\n    case \\\"deepseek\\\": return \\\"https://api.deepseek.com/v1\\\";\\n    case \\\"groq\\\": return \\\"https://api.groq.com/openai/v1\\\";\\n    case \\\"local\\\": return `${ollamaUrl}/v1`;\\n    case \\\"gemini\\\": return \\\"https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/openai\\\";\\n    default: return \\\"https://api.openai.com/v1\\\";\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n\\n/** Approximate context window sizes per provider/model. */\\nfunction resolveContextWindow(type: ProviderType, model: string): number {\\n  switch (type) {\\n    case \\\"anthropic\\\": return 200_000;\\n    case \\\"openai\\\": return 128_000;\\n    case \\\"gemini\\\": return 1_000_000;\\n    case \\\"deepseek\\\": return 128_000;\\n    case \\\"groq\\\": return 128_000;\\n    case \\\"local\\\": return Number(process.env.LOCAL_CONTEXT_WINDOW) || 32_768;\\n    default: return 128_000;\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":217,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":217}}"</outcome>

userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\",\"numLines\":75,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":218}}"</outcome>

--------------

- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks

- Simple file listings

      - discovery: learning about existing system

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)

      - gotcha: traps or edge cases

events.jsonl 同信任域、未外傳。Phase 2 analyzer 讀取前可再過濾。\\n- 🟢 **R-D：size cap 靜默丟資料**。超 32MB 後安靜跳過寫入 → 可能漏記。\\n  Phase 1 接受（observations 是「養資料」非關鍵路徑），Phase 2 補 rotate 取代 cap。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. 學習查詢結果（R-3 3）與方案 1/2 都假設「`direct.ts:121` 呼叫 `runToolLoop` 前，\\n  可從 `session._recentToolNames` 注入 `getRecentTools` 回呼」——**此前提為假**。\\n  DirectProvider 與 SessionManager 之間沒有 session 引用通道（刻意的分層：\\n  provider 不依賴 sessionManager）。\\n- **設計回應**：Tier B 的 `precedingTools` **改為在 `runToolLoop` 內 loop-local 自行累積**\\n  純工具名序列（見 §模組 / BC-1a），不經 session、不經 opts 回呼。\\n  這同時順帶解掉 skeptic 致命#1（進 loop 前單次快照陳舊）——因為序列就活在 loop 內逐 iteration 累積。\\n\\n### F2 🟢 兩路徑在 `applyUpdate` 的 `tool_call_update` case 匯流\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`sessionManager.ts:228` `provider.on(\\\"update\\\", (u) => this.applyUpdate(session, u))`\\n  對 ACP+Direct 同一註冊（createProvider :259–284 兩分支建出的 provider 都掛這條）。\\n  `tool_call_update` case 在 :373–405，既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",{name,status})` 在 :387/:394。\\n- 🔴 反例：若 Direct 不走這條，應見 DirectProvider 另有 update 出口；實際 `direct.ts:174 this.emit(\\\"update\\\", u)`\\n  正是 `provider.on(\\\"update\\\")` 訂閱的事件 → 反例成立，Direct 確實匯流於此。\\n\\n### F3 🟢 `session.activeProvider` 可靠區分兩路徑（BC-1/BC-2 路由依據）\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`ChatSession.activeProvider: ProviderType`（`sessionManager.ts:59`），\\n  `applyUpdate(session, u)`（:328）session 完整在 scope。`ProviderType` union（`types.ts:45`）=\\n  `\\\"acp\\\"|\\\"anthropic\\\"|\\\"openai\\\"|\\\"gemini\\\"|\\\"deepseek\\\"|\\\"groq\\\"|\\\"local\\\"`，**僅 `\\\"acp\\\"` 為 ACP**，\\n  其餘 6 值全走 DirectProvider（`createProvider` :260 只有 `type===\\\"acp\\\"` 走 AcpProvider，\\n  :271 註解「All other types use DirectProvider」）。\\n- 🔴 反例：若有非-acp 值也走 ACP，應見 createProvider 多一個 ACP 分支；實際只有一個 → 反例通過。\\n- ∴ `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"` 判別 ACP、否則 Direct，**無歧義**。使用者列為 must-verify\\n  的「session 能否取得 provider type」風險**已關閉**（A 級）。\\n\\n### F4 🟢 Tier B 必須在 `executeToolCalls` 內就近寫，不能靠 `onToolEnd`\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`tool-loop.ts:239` `onToolEnd?.(name, output.slice(0,200), !!result.isError)` —\\n  傳給回呼的 output 已被 `slice(0,200)` 截斷。executeToolCalls 內（:210–245）\\n  `name`/`args`(:213 JSON.parse 後)/未截斷 `output`(:234)/`result.isError`(:239) 全在 scope。\\n- ∴ rich observation 必在 executeToolCalls 內取，印證雙層架構分工（A 級）。\\n\\n### F5 🟢 RTK rewrite 會在觀測前污染 `args.command`\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`tool-loop.ts:221–223`，當 `RTK_ENABLED && name===\\\"shell\\\"` 時\\n  `args.command = applyRtkPrefix(args.command)`（加 `rtk ` 前綴），發生在 `:226 pool.callTool` 前、\\n  也在任何 observation 讀取點前。\\n- **影響**：若 observer 在 result 之後讀 `args.command`，記到的是 `rtk git status` 而非 agent\\n  原本想跑的 `git status` → instinct 萃取語意污染。\\n- **設計回應**：在 RTK rewrite **之前**（:220 之前）快照 `args` 的原始副本供 observation 使用（見 §模組）。\\n\\n### F6 🟢 既有 fail-silent 範式存在，BC-5 可直接沿用\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`event-log.ts:56–67` `logEvent` 用 `try { mkdirSync; appendFileSync } catch { console.error }`\\n  吞錯不中斷主流程。observer 沿用同模式即滿足 BC-5。\\n\\n### F7 🟢 方案 A（粗粒度統計）已落地，本輪是疊加新訊號\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`event-log.ts` 有 `EventType=\\\"tool_call\\\"`(:23) + `getToolUsageStats`(:159 區段)，\\n  寫 `config.memoryDir/events.jsonl`(:36)。本輪 observations 走**獨立檔**，與之共存（見 §取捨）。\\n\\n### F8 🟡 `precedingTools` 在 session 無現成純工具名序列（Tier A 用）\\n\\n- 🟡 B 級：grep `ChatSession`（:54–131）既有狀態只有 `toolLog`(含 emoji 前綴, :67)、\\n  `_toolTitles`(:124)、`_consecutiveToolFails`(:122)，無純工具名序列陣列。\\n- 🔴 反例：若有應見 `_toolSeq`/`_recentTools` 欄位；grep 未命中 → 傾向需新增。\\n  標 B 級因未窮舉所有 `_` 前綴欄位，但已讀完整 interface 宣告區（:54–131），信心偏高。\\n- **設計回應**：Tier A 新增 `ChatSession._recentToolNames?: string[]`（optional，不破壞既有\\n  create 物件字面量 :198–226，初始未列即 undefined，observer 以 `?? []` 容錯）。\\n\\n### F9 🔴 `resetTurn` 是 turn 邊界但不清 `_recentToolNames`（致命#3 因果鏈）\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`resetTurn`（`sessionManager.ts:412–421`）清 `buffer/thinkingBuffer/toolLog/stderrTail/\\n  _toolInFlight/_streamingDelegates`，並 `_toolTitles?.clear()`(:419)，但**不碰**新欄位 `_recentToolNames`。\\n- **影響**：若不處理，上一 turn 的工具名會殘留進下一 turn 的 `precedingTools` → 跨 turn 假 combo。\\n- **設計回應**：把 `resetTurn` 納入因果鏈呼叫者窮舉（§因果鏈 C3）。\\n  **採「不清空，但寫入 turn 邊界 marker」**——`_recentToolNames` 在 turn 開始時 push 一個哨兵\\n  `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`，analyzer(Phase 2) 見哨兵即切斷 combo。理由：硬清空會讓每 turn 第一個\\n  tool 的 precedingTools 永遠空，與「最近 N 個」設計矛盾；marker 保留可逆性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. 在兩條 Provider 路徑（ACP / Direct）就既有匯流點埋低風險、fail-silent 的 observation 寫入。\\n2. 把 tool 使用落盤成結構化 JSONL（`observations.jsonl`），schema 一次設計到位（多記不漏記），\\n   供 Phase 2 analyzer 直接讀取，避免 re-collect。\\n3. **本輪不碰** analyzer、不碰 `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` 出口、不 mutate messages、\\n   不動 `ToolResult` 介面。\\n4. 誠實標注 ACP 萃取天花板（只有 name+status+完成順序近似），把語意可信度落到 schema 欄位，\\n   避免 Phase 2「正確地放大錯誤前提」（#003 警惕）。\\n\\n非目標（明確排除，YAGNI）：pluggable hook registry、mutate-messages、analyzer、SKILL_PROPOSE 接線、\\nobservations rotate（Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底，見 §取捨）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 2.1 `src/tool-observer.ts`（新檔 · 唯一寫入收斂點）\\n\\n職責：observation schema 組裝、脫敏、截斷、JSONL append、fail-silent 全吞。零業務邏輯外洩。\\n\\n匯出：\\n- `recordSeqObservation(input: SeqObservationInput): void` — Tier A。fire-and-forget。\\n- `recordRichObservation(input: RichObservationInput): void` — Tier B。fire-and-forget。\\n- `redactArgs(args: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown>` — 脫敏（export 供測試）。\\n- 型別 `Observation` / `SeqObservationInput` / `RichObservationInput`（export 供測試與 Phase 2）。\\n- `OBSERVATIONS_PATH` 常數（= `join(config.memoryDir, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\")`）。\\n\\n內部：\\n- `appendObservation(obs: Observation): void` — **整段 `try { ... appendFileSync ... } catch { console.error }`**\\n  包覆（涵蓋 schema 組裝 + 脫敏 + 同步寫入的所有拋錯，不只 `.catch`；修 skeptic「`.catch(()=>{})`\\n  對同步拋錯無效」）。沿用 `event-log.ts:56–67` 的 mkdirSync+appendFileSync 範式（F6）。\\n- **size cap**：append 前 `existsSync && statSync(path).size > OBS_MAX_BYTES`（建議 32 MB，常數可調）\\n  → 安靜跳過寫入（不滾動、不刪除，Phase 2 補 rotate）。修 skeptic「無界增長 + 不存在的 30 天滾動前提」。\\n- `truncate(s, OBS_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS)` — observer **自帶** hard cap（建議 8 KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 把洩漏合約化的缺陷）；\\n  殘留洩漏風險由「observations.jsonl 與 events.jsonl 同信任域、本機 memoryDir、未外傳」承擔。\\n\\n### 2.2 `src/provider/tool-loop.ts`（既有 · Tier B 埋點 + loop-local 序列）\\n\\n- `runToolLoop`（:77–176）內新增 loop-local `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"exec-order\\\", sessionId, chatId }`。\\n  - `precedingSnapshot` = `executeToolCalls` 進入時的 `recentToolNames` 副本（由新增 opts 欄位傳入，見下）。\\n- `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n  - 由 `direct.ts:121` 呼叫端注入 `observe`。**但** `direct.ts` 無 session（F1）→ sessionId 用\\n    DirectProvider 既有的 `this`-scope 值。**誠實邊界**：`prompt()` 內目前唯一可得的穩定識別是\\n    `initialize()` 回傳的 `direct-${Date.now()}`（:93），但它未存成欄位。\\n    **設計回應**：DirectProvider 新增 `private _sessionId = \\\"\\\"`，在 `initialize()`(:93) 賦值，\\n    `prompt()` 注入 `observe:{ sessionId: this._sessionId }`（chatId 在 Direct 不可得 → 省略，\\n    observer 以 optional 容錯）。此為 §因果鏈 C2 的連動點。\\n\\n### 2.3 `src/sessionManager.ts`（既有 · Tier A 埋點 + 新欄位 + resetTurn）\\n\\n- `ChatSession` 介面（:54–131）新增 `_recentToolNames?: string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 `recordSeqObservation({ source:\\\"seq\\\", name:toolName, status:\\\"completed\\\",\\n    sessionId:session.sessionId, chatId:session.chatId, precedingTools: session._recentToolNames ?? [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證 · 編號）\\n\\n> 標 `[testable]` 者 Phase 1 內須有自動化測試；`[deferred-Phase2]` 者本輪只在 schema 預留欄位、不實作邏輯。\\n\\n- **BC-1 [testable]**：同一 Direct（`activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"`）tool call 只產生 **1 筆**\\n  `source:\\\"rich\\\"` observation，Tier A 對該路徑**不**寫 seq。\\n  驗法：mock `activeProvider=\\\"anthropic\\\"`，跑一次 `executeToolCalls`（含一個成功 tool）+ 對應\\n  `tool_call_update completed`，斷言 `observations.jsonl` occurrences≥5 才 propose。Phase 1 不實作；\\n  僅確保每筆 observation 帶 `ts`+`sessionId`+`name` 供 Phase 2 聚合計數。\\n\\n- **BC-5 [framework-dependent][testable]**：observations 寫入失敗**不中斷** tool loop / session。\\n `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` 的值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`，路徑類值保留。\\n  驗法：餵 `{command:\\\"ls /home\\\", apiKey:\\\"sk-xxx\\\"}` 斷言 `apiKey` 被 redact、`command` 保留。\\n  ⚠️ 本契約**只驗「key **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

===========================

`_toolTitles`(:124)、`_consecutiveToolFails`(:122)，無純工具名序列陣列。\\n- 🔴 反例：若有應見 `_toolSeq`/`_recentTools` 欄位；grep 未命中 → 傾向需新增。\\n  標 B 級因未窮舉所有 `_` 前綴欄位，但已讀完整 interface 宣告區（:54–131），信心偏高。\\n- **設計回應**：Tier A 新增 `ChatSession._recentToolNames?: string[]`（optional，不破壞既有\\n  create 物件字面量 :198–226，初始未列即 undefined，observer 以 `?? []` 容錯）。\\n\\n### F9 🔴 `resetTurn` 是 turn 邊界但不清 `_recentToolNames`（致命#3 因果鏈）\\n\\n- 🟢 A 級：`resetTurn`（`sessionManager.ts:412–421`）清 `buffer/thinkingBuffer/toolLog/stderrTail/\\n  _toolInFlight/_streamingDelegates`，並 `_toolTitles?.clear()`(:419)，但**不碰**新欄位 `_recentToolNames`。\\n- **影響**：若不處理，上一 turn 的工具名會殘留進下一 turn 的 `precedingTools` → 跨 turn 假 combo。\\n- **設計回應**：把 `resetTurn` 納入因果鏈呼叫者窮舉（§因果鏈 C3）。\\n  **採「不清空，但寫入 turn 邊界 marker」**——`_recentToolNames` 在 turn 開始時 push 一個哨兵\\n  `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`，analyzer(Phase 2) 見哨兵即切斷 combo。理由：硬清空會讓每 turn 第一個\\n  tool 的 precedingTools 永遠空，與「最近 N 個」設計矛盾；marker 保留可逆性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. 在兩條 Provider 路徑（ACP / Direct）就既有匯流點埋低風險、fail-silent 的 observation 寫入。\\n2. 把 tool 使用落盤成結構化 JSONL（`observations.jsonl`），schema 一次設計到位（多記不漏記），\\n   供 Phase 2 analyzer 直接讀取，避免 re-collect。\\n3. **本輪不碰** analyzer、不碰 `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` 出口、不 mutate messages、\\n   不動 `ToolResult` 介面。\\n4. 誠實標注 ACP 萃取天花板（只有 name+status+完成順序近似），把語意可信度落到 schema 欄位，\\n   避免 Phase 2「正確地放大錯誤前提」（#003 警惕）。\\n\\n非目標（明確排除，YAGNI）：pluggable hook registry、mutate-messages、analyzer、SKILL_PROPOSE 接線、\\nobservations rotate（Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底，見 §取捨）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 2.1 `src/tool-observer.ts`（新檔 · 唯一寫入收斂點）\\n\\n職責：observation schema 組裝、脫敏、截斷、JSONL append、fail-silent 全吞。零業務邏輯外洩。\\n\\n匯出：\\n- `recordSeqObservation(input: SeqObservationInput): void` — Tier A。fire-and-forget。\\n- `recordRichObservation(input: RichObservationInput): void` — Tier B。fire-and-forget。\\n- `redactArgs(args: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown>` — 脫敏（export 供測試）。\\n- 型別 `Observation` / `SeqObservationInput` / `RichObservationInput`（export 供測試與 Phase 2）。\\n- `OBSERVATIONS_PATH` 常數（= `join(config.memoryDir, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\")`）。\\n\\n內部：\\n- `appendObservation(obs: Observation): void` — **整段 `try { ... appendFileSync ... } catch { console.error }`**\\n  包覆（涵蓋 schema 組裝 + 脫敏 + 同步寫入的所有拋錯，不只 `.catch`；修 skeptic「`.catch(()=>{})`\\n  對同步拋錯無效」）。沿用 `event-log.ts:56–67` 的 mkdirSync+appendFileSync 範式（F6）。\\n- **size cap**：append 前 `existsSync && statSync(path).size > OBS_MAX_BYTES`（建議 32 MB，常數可調）\\n  → 安靜跳過寫入（不滾動、不刪除，Phase 2 補 rotate）。修 skeptic「無界增長 + 不存在的 30 天滾動前提」。\\n- `truncate(s, OBS_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS)` — observer **自帶** hard cap（建議 8 KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 把洩漏合約化的缺陷）；\\n  殘留洩漏風險由「observations.jsonl 與 events.jsonl 同信任域、本機 memoryDir、未外傳」承擔。\\n\\n### 2.2 `src/provider/tool-loop.ts`（既有 · Tier B 埋點 + loop-local 序列）\\n\\n- `runToolLoop`（:77–176）內新增 loop-local `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 因果鏈分析（既有連動點 · grep 呼叫者窮舉）\\n\\n### C1 — `sessionManager.applyUpdate`（Tier A 埋點）\\n- **根因**：兩路徑 tool 完成事件的天然匯流點，要在此就 ACP 路徑寫 seq observation。\\n- **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 optional\\n  → 不破壞既有 `onText/onThinking/onToolStart/onToolEnd` 呼叫（向後相容）。\\n- **DirectProvider 連動（F1 修正引入）**：新增 `private _sessionId`，賦值點 `initialize()`(:93)，\\n  讀取點 `prompt()`(:121)。`_sessionId` 在 initialize 前為 `\\\"\\\"`；prompt 一定在 initialize 後呼叫\\n  （SessionManager.create :252 先 await initialize 才 set session）→ 無空值風險。\\n- **隱性風險**：只讀不寫 `results`/`messages` → 對 messages 注入、CodeGraph enrichment(:229–232)\\n  的 truncation 語意**零影響**（印證去 mutate 野心）。`ToolResult` 介面(:194–197) 不動。\\n- **決策**：rich observation 在 try **與** catch 分支都寫（致命#4）；args 取 RTK 前原始副本（F5/BC-7）。\\n\\n### C3 — `ChatSession` 介面 + `resetTurn`（新欄位 `_recentToolNames`）\\n- **根因**：Tier A `precedingTools` 需純工具名序列，既有無此狀態（F8）。\\n- **呼叫者/讀寫點（grep 窮舉）**：\\n  - 宣告：`ChatSession`(:54–131) 新增 optional 欄位 → `create`(:198–226) 物件字面量不需改（undefined 容錯）。\\n  - **唯一 push 維護點**：`tool_call` case(:367 區段)。\\n  - **讀取點**：`tool_call_update` case(:383/:394，僅 ACP 分支)。\\n  - **turn 邊界**：`resetTurn`(:412–421) — **此處是致命#3 的因果鏈漏接點**，必須 push marker\\n    （不清空）。grep `resetTurn` 呼叫者確認其為每 turn 重置入口（被 run-prompt 在 turn 起始呼叫）。\\n- **決策**：採 marker 不清空（F9 理由）；push 僅一處（不重複計數）。\\n\\n### C4 — 既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",...)` / `getToolUsageStats`（零衝突確認）\\n- seq observation 寫**獨立** `observations.jsonl`，event-log 寫 `events.jsonl`（F7）。\\n  二者不同檔、不互相覆寫、不競態。Tier A 在 `logEvent` 之後執行，不取代它。\\n\\n### C5 — `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` / preamble（Phase 1 不觸碰確認）\\n- grep 確認本輪改動不 import/呼叫 `skill-suggest`、不產 `SKILL_PROPOSE` token、不 rebuild preamble\\n  → 不踩 `POLICIES/preamble-frozen-snapshot.md`。Phase 2 才接。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 取捨與風險\\n\\n### 取捨\\n1. **獨立 `observations.jsonl` vs 擴充 event-log**（需求#2）：選獨立檔。\\n   - 理由：rich schema（巢狀 args/output/precedingTools）與 event-log 扁平 `{type,payload}` 不合；\\n     Phase 2 可單獨 rotate observations 不污染 30 天 event 滾動。\\n   - 代價：另一份檔案的生命週期。**Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底**（§2.1），不接受「30 天可滾動」的不存在前提\\n     （修方案 2/3 把不存在的 rotate 當前提）。\\n2. **路徑分流去重（BC-1）vs analyzer 端 dedup**：選路徑分流（簡單、無共享狀態），\\n   正確性綁 `activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"` 判別——已 A 級驗證可靠（F3）。\\n   退路保留但 Phase 1 不啟用：schema 帶 `source`，若日後判別不可靠可改 analyzer 端 dedup。\\n3. **`precedingTools` loop-local（Tier B）vs session 欄位（Tier A）**：兩路徑來源不同。\\n   Tier B 走 runToolLoop loop-local（F1 強制如此，且順帶解陳舊快照問題）；\\n   Tier A 走 `session._recentToolNames`（ACP 無 loop 可借）。語意差異由 `precedingToolsSemantics` 標注。\\n4. **脫敏黑名單 + shell value-level regex**：best-effort，不合約化（§2.1 / BC-6）。\\n5. **output hard cap 自帶 8KB**：不借 undefined 的 `maxToolResultChars`（F5 風險）。需求未指定，設計選擇。\\n\\n### 風險（誠實評估）\\n- 🔴 **R-A：ACP 萃取天花板（需求#5 核心誠實評估）**。ACP 在 `tool_call_update`（完成事件）寫入，\\n  ACP 進程外並行跑 tool 時 update 到達序 = **完成序非發起序**，與 agent 真實意圖序列無關。\\n  ∴ Tier A 的 combo 訊號**先天受限**，`precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"` 已顯式標注\\n  讓 Phase 2 不把它當 exec-order 用（避免#003「正確放大錯前提」）。\\n  **價值定位**：「兩者都用」中 Tier A 價值偏低，主要價值在 Tier B rich。但埋點成本極低\\n  （1 行條件 + 1 個 <observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>Post-Tool Hook Architecture Finalized via Multi-Agent Design Workflow</title>
  <subtitle>Four-phase adversarial design workflow completed; YAGNI dual-tier observer pattern selected as base architecture with 7 mandatory fixes identified</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>Dev-design workflow executed 4 phases: Explore verified code architecture, Propose generated 3 competing designs, Adversarial identified 7 fatal flaws, Synthesize preparing final spec</fact>
    <fact>YAGNI proposal (simplicity-first) selected as base architecture scoring 70/100: rejects pluggable hook registry as unnecessary for 2 fixed injection points, uses getRecentTools callback for precedingTools</fact>
    <fact>Dual-tier observer pattern finalised: Tier A writes sequential observations (name+status) at sessionManager.applyUpdate tool_call_update for ACP paths, Tier B writes rich observations (args+output) at tool-loop.ts executeToolCalls for DirectProvider paths</fact>
    <fact>Seven fatal flaws identified requiring fixes: precedingTools multi-iteration staleness (snapshot before loop entry stale from iteration 2+), ACP completion-order vs invocation-order semantic ambiguity, resetTurn lifecycle gap for _recentToolNames, Direct failed tools completely silent, args redaction blacklist leakage, output truncation undefined reliance, unbounded observations.jsonl growth</fact>
    <fact>Adversarial judge panel mandated fixes: precedingTools must be loop-scoped not snapshot, ACP removes precedingTools field entirely or adds semantic annotation, resetTurn must explicitly define _recentToolNames clearing behavior, catch branch must write rich observations with isError=true, observer needs independent output hard cap, Phase 1 requires size-based rotation cap</fact>
    <fact>BC-1 deduplication verified reliable: session.activeProvider === 'acp' check validated via ProviderType union containing only "acp" as ACP variant with all others DirectProvider per createProvider factory at sessionManager.ts:260</fact>
    <fact>Historical warning patterns loaded from 問題追蹤.md: #001 existence claims require command verification, #003 single-source inference forbidden without A-grade evidence, #007 self-review needs cross-source validation</fact>
    <fact>Artifacts directory created at .claude-loop/artifacts/ to receive P1-design-spec.md as inaugural workflow output</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session executed a comprehensive multi-agent design workflow to finalize the architecture for "modification plan B" - a post-tool hook system enabling automatic skill extraction from tool usage patterns. The workflow proceeded through four phases: Exploration verified existing code architecture discovering dual-path provider convergence at sessionManager.applyUpdate and DirectProvider-exclusive runToolLoop execution; Propose generated three competing architectures from perspective-diverse agents (MVP-first emphasizing minimal Phase 1 scope, YAGNI rejecting over-abstraction, Robustness advocating layered fail-silent protection); Adversarial deployed skeptic agents identifying seven fatal architectural flaws that would corrupt Phase 1 data collection; and Synthesize now preparing final specification. The judge panel selected YAGNI (simplicity-first) as base architecture for correctly rejecting pluggable hook registry abstraction (only 2 fixed injection points don't justify plugin infrastructure) and using cleaner getRecentTools callback over passing session objects, but mandated extensive fixes for all identified fatal flaws. The most severe flaw discovered was precedingTools multi-iteration staleness: all three proposals injected precedingTools at direct.ts:121 before runToolLoop entry, but runToolLoop executes a for loop (line 87) calling executeToolCalls multiple times—from iteration 2 onward the snapshot reflects stale data, and Promise.all parallel execution means same-round tools share identical prefixes. The second critical flaw affects ACP's Tier A observations: tool_call_update events arrive in completion-order for parallel tools not invocation-order, creating semantic confusion that Phase 2 analyzer would treat as causal signal. The architecture implements dual-tier observation: Tier A captures sequential patterns (tool name+status) at sessionManager tool_call_update convergence point for ACP paths only (checking session.activeProvider === 'acp'), Tier B captures rich context (args+output+precedingTools) within tool-loop.ts executeToolCalls for DirectProvider paths only, both writing to independent observations.jsonl file. Historical warning patterns from 問題追蹤.md provided guardrails: pattern #001 validated proposals' architectural claims required grep verification (fulfilled), pattern #003 ensured activeProvider discrimination claims had A-grade code evidence (Explore phase provided), pattern #007 warned adversarial evaluation itself needs cross-source validation (multi-agent structure provides). The workflow demonstrates mature engineering discipline: Explore phase verified code reality against proposals' assumptions, Propose phase generated alternatives from competing philosophies, Adversarial phase caught fatal flaws through skeptic refutation, historical patterns prevented repetition of past cognitive failures, and Synthesize phase will integrate all context into actionable Phase 1 implementation specification.</narrative>

KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"exec-order\\\", sessionId, chatId }`。\\n  - `precedingSnapshot` = `executeToolCalls` 進入時的 `recentToolNames` 副本（由新增 opts 欄位傳入，見下）。\\n- `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n `direct-${Date.now()}`（:93），但它未存成欄位。\\n    **設計回應**：DirectProvider 新增 `private _sessionId = \\\"\\\"`，在 `initialize()`(:93) 賦值，\\n    `prompt()` 注入 `observe:{ sessionId: this._sessionId }`（chatId 在 Direct 不可得 → 省略，\\n    observer 以 optional 容錯）。此為 §因果鏈 C2 的連動點。\\n\\n### 2.3 `src/sessionManager.ts`（既有 · Tier A 埋點 + 新欄位 + resetTurn）\\n\\n- `ChatSession` 介面（:54–131）新增 `_recentToolNames?: string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 `recordSeqObservation({ source:\\\"seq\\\", name:toolName, status:\\\"completed\\\",\\n    sessionId:session.sessionId, chatId:session.chatId, precedingTools: session._recentToolNames ?? [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證 · 編號）\\n\\n> 標 `[testable]` 者 Phase 1 內須有自動化測試；`[deferred-Phase2]` 者本輪只在 schema 預留欄位、不實作邏輯。\\n\\n- **BC-1 [testable]**：同一 Direct（`activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"`）tool call 只產生 **1 筆**\\n `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 因果鏈分析（既有連動點 · grep 呼叫者窮舉）\\n\\n### C1 — `sessionManager.applyUpdate`（Tier A 埋點）\\n- **根因**：兩路徑 tool 完成事件的天然匯流點，要在此就 ACP 路徑寫 seq observation。\\n- **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 optional\\n  → 不破壞既有 `onText/onThinking/onToolStart/onToolEnd` 呼叫（向後相容）。\\n- **DirectProvider 連動（F1 修正引入）**：新增 `private _sessionId`，賦值點 `initialize()`(:93)，\\n  讀取點 `prompt()`(:121)。`_sessionId` 在 initialize 前為 `\\\"\\\"`；prompt 一定在 initialize 後呼叫\\n  （SessionManager.create :252 先 await initialize 才 set session）→ 無空值風險。\\n- **隱性風險**：只讀不寫 `results`/`messages` → 對 messages 注入、CodeGraph enrichment(:229–232)\\n  的 truncation 語意**零影響**（印證去 mutate 野心）。`ToolResult` 介面(:194–197) 不動。\\n- **決策**：rich observation 在 try **與** catch 分支都寫（致命#4）；args 取 RTK 前原始副本（F5/BC-7）。\\n\\n### C3 — `ChatSession` 介面 + `resetTurn`（新欄位 `_recentToolNames`）\\n- **根因**：Tier A `precedingTools` 需純工具名序列，既有無此狀態（F8）。\\n- **呼叫者/讀寫點（grep 窮舉）**：\\n  - 宣告：`ChatSession`(:54–131) 新增 optional 欄位 → `create`(:198–226) 物件字面量不需改（undefined 容錯）。\\n  - **唯一 push 維護點**：`tool_call` case(:367 區段)。\\n  - **讀取點**：`tool_call_update` case(:383/:394，僅 ACP 分支)。\\n  - **turn 邊界**：`resetTurn`(:412–421) — **此處是致命#3 的因果鏈漏接點**，必須 push marker\\n    （不清空）。grep `resetTurn` 呼叫者確認其為每 turn 重置入口（被 run-prompt 在 turn 起始呼叫）。\\n- **決策**：採 marker 不清空（F9 理由）；push 僅一處（不重複計數）。\\n\\n### C4 — 既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",...)` / `getToolUsageStats`（零衝突確認）\\n- seq observation 寫**獨立** `observations.jsonl`，event-log 寫 `events.jsonl`（F7）。\\n  二者不同檔、不互相覆寫、不競態。Tier A 在 `logEvent` 之後執行，不取代它。\\n\\n### C5 — `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` / preamble（Phase 1 不觸碰確認）\\n- grep 確認本輪改動不 import/呼叫 `skill-suggest`、不產 `SKILL_PROPOSE` token、不 rebuild preamble\\n  → 不踩 `POLICIES/preamble-frozen-snapshot.md`。Phase 2 才接。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 取捨與風險\\n\\n### 取捨\\n1. **獨立 `observations.jsonl` vs 擴充 event-log**（需求#2）：選獨立檔。\\n   - 理由：rich schema（巢狀 args/output/precedingTools）與 event-log 扁平 `{type,payload}` 不合；\\n     Phase 2 可單獨 rotate observations 不污染 30 天 event 滾動。\\n   - 代價：另一份檔案的生命週期。**Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底**（§2.1），不接受「30 天可滾動」的不存在前提\\n     （修方案 2/3 把不存在的 rotate 當前提）。\\n2. **路徑分流去重（BC-1）vs analyzer 端 dedup**：選路徑分流（簡單、無共享狀態），\\n   正確性綁 `activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"` 判別——已 A 級驗證可靠（F3）。\\n   退路保留但 Phase 1 不啟用：schema 帶 `source`，若日後判別不可靠可改 analyzer 端 dedup。\\n3. **`precedingTools` loop-local（Tier B）vs session 欄位（Tier A）**：兩路徑來源不同。\\n   Tier B 走 runToolLoop loop-local（F1 強制如此，且順帶解陳舊快照問題）；\\n   Tier A 走 `session._recentToolNames`（ACP 無 loop 可借）。語意差異由 `precedingToolsSemantics` 標注。\\n4. **脫敏黑名單 + shell value-level regex**：best-effort，不合約化（§2.1 / BC-6）。\\n5. **output hard cap 自帶 8KB**：不借 undefined 的 `maxToolResultChars`（F5 風險）。需求未指定，設計選擇。\\n\\n### 風險（誠實評估）\\n- 🔴 **R-A：ACP 萃取天花板（需求#5 核心誠實評估）**。ACP 在 `tool_call_update`（完成事件）寫入，\\n  ACP 進程外並行跑 tool 時 update 到達序 = **完成序非發起序**，與 agent 真實意圖序列無關。\\n  ∴ Tier A 的 combo 訊號**先天受限**，`precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"` 已顯式標注\\n  讓 Phase 2 不把它當 exec-order 用（避免#003「正確放大錯前提」）。\\n  **價值定位**：「兩者都用」中 Tier A 價值偏低，主要價值在 Tier B rich。但埋點成本極低\\n  （1 行條件 + 1 個 ring buffer push + marker），且使用者明確要求兩路徑都做 → Phase 1 保留 Tier A 合理；\\n  若 Phase 2 證實 ACP seq 噪音過大，可降級為純佔位而不影響 Tier B。**沉沒成本可接受。**\\n- 🟡 **R-B：分期策略（需求#4）**。Phase 1 只養資料、Phase 2 才 analyzer，低風險先行**合理**。\\n  殘留風險：schema 寫死後 Phase 2 才發現欄位不足需 re-collect。緩解：schema 寧可多記\\n  （precedingTools/source/semantics/sessionId/ts/isError 齊備）。\\n  **強建議（採 skeptic 正確主張）**：Phase 1 落地前跑一個 ≤30 行純統計 throwaway 腳本，\\n  讀幾筆真實 observation 驗 schema 真能 cluster 出 ≥1 合理訊號，否則「養資料」可能養髒資料（違反 Q4）。\\n  此驗證**不阻塞** Phase 1 PR，但列為 Phase 2 開工前的 gate。\\n- 🟡 **R-C：脫敏殘留洩漏**。黑名單 + shell regex 擋不住所有內嵌 secret。\\n  承擔依據：本機 memoryDir、與 events.jsonl 同信任域、未外傳。Phase 2 analyzer 讀取前可再過濾。\\n- 🟢 **R-D：size cap 靜默丟資料**。超 32MB 後安靜跳過寫入 → 可能漏記。\\n  Phase 1 接受（observations 是「養資料」非關鍵路徑），Phase 2 補 rotate 取代 cap。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 6. 學習查詢結果（R-3 兩層教訓 · 必讀）\\n\\n讀 `.claudedocs/records/問題追蹤.md`「長期警惕模式」#001–#007：\\n\\n- **命中 #003 / #004 / #005（認知性·事實主張·共用值）**：本設計含「DirectProvider 拿不到 session」\\n  「activeProvider 可靠區分」等事實斷言 → 已在 §0 逐條附 A 級檔:行證據 +  本規格本身仍是 single-architect 產出 → 建議 Phase 1 實作後走 `/dev-review` 派異源 skeptic\\n  複驗 BC-1a/BC-7/BC-8（loop-local 序列、RTK 前快照、turn marker 三個最易出錯點）。\\n- 未命中 #001/#002/#006（存在性宣告 / routing 誤置 / 行數預算）—— 本任務非診斷類、非模板行數類。\\n\\n學習查詢：問題追蹤命中 [#003 #004 #005 #007] / learning-log 未掃（`.claude-loop/learning-log.md`\\n此 repo 未確認存在，非阻塞）/ 其餘無相關。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 7. 落地範圍與驗收\\n\\n**本輪只實作 Phase 1**：\\n- 新檔 precedingTools 永遠空，與「最近 N 個」設計矛盾；marker 保留可逆性。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 1. 目標\\n\\n1. 在兩條 Provider 路徑（ACP / Direct）就既有匯流點埋低風險、fail-silent 的 observation 寫入。\\n2. 把 tool 使用落盤成結構化 JSONL（`observations.jsonl`），schema 一次設計到位（多記不漏記），\\n   供 Phase 2 analyzer 直接讀取，避免 re-collect。\\n3. **本輪不碰** analyzer、不碰 `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` 出口、不 mutate messages、\\n   不動 `ToolResult` 介面。\\n4. 誠實標注 ACP 萃取天花板（只有 name+status+完成順序近似），把語意可信度落到 schema 欄位，\\n   避免 Phase 2「正確地放大錯誤前提」（#003 警惕）。\\n\\n非目標（明確排除，YAGNI）：pluggable hook registry、mutate-messages、analyzer、SKILL_PROPOSE 接線、\\nobservations rotate（Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底，見 §取捨）。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 2. 模組與職責\\n\\n### 2.1 `src/tool-observer.ts`（新檔 · 唯一寫入收斂點）\\n\\n職責：observation schema 組裝、脫敏、截斷、JSONL append、fail-silent 全吞。零業務邏輯外洩。\\n\\n匯出：\\n- `recordSeqObservation(input: SeqObservationInput): void` — Tier A。fire-and-forget。\\n- `recordRichObservation(input: RichObservationInput): void` — Tier B。fire-and-forget。\\n- `redactArgs(args: Record<string, unknown>): Record<string, unknown>` — 脫敏（export 供測試）。\\n- 型別 `Observation` / `SeqObservationInput` / `RichObservationInput`（export 供測試與 Phase 2）。\\n- `OBSERVATIONS_PATH` 常數（= `join(config.memoryDir, \\\"observations.jsonl\\\")`）。\\n\\n內部：\\n- `appendObservation(obs: Observation): void` — **整段 `try { ... appendFileSync ... } catch { console.error }`**\\n  包覆（涵蓋 schema 組裝 + 脫敏 + 同步寫入的所有拋錯，不只 `.catch`；修 skeptic「`.catch(()=>{})`\\n  對同步拋錯無效」）。沿用 `event-log.ts:56–67` 的 mkdirSync+appendFileSync 範式（F6）。\\n- **size cap**：append 前 `existsSync && statSync(path).size > OBS_MAX_BYTES`（建議 32 MB，常數可調）\\n  → 安靜跳過寫入（不滾動、不刪除，Phase 2 補 rotate）。修 skeptic「無界增長 + 不存在的 30 天滾動前提」。\\n- `truncate(s, OBS_MAX_OUTPUT_CHARS)` — observer **自帶** hard cap（建議 8 KB），**不借**\\n  `maxToolResultChars`（F5 之外另一風險：該值非 local 時為 undefined=不截斷，見 `direct.ts:122–125`）。\\n\\nObservation schema（rich 與 seq 共用骨架 + 各自擴充；BC-6）：\\n```\\n{ ts: string(ISO),\\n  source: \\\"seq\\\" | \\\"rich\\\",\\n  name: string,                 // 工具名（原始，未經 RTK rewrite）\\n  sessionId: string,\\n  chatId?: number,\\n  precedingTools: string[],     // 含 turn 邊界 marker（見 F9）\\n  precedingToolsSemantics: \\\"exec-order\\\" | \\\"completion-order-approx\\\",  // seq+ACP=後者（修致命#2）\\n  // rich only:\\n  args?: Record<string, unknown>,   // 經 redactArgs + 截斷\\n  output?: string,                  // 經 truncate\\n  isError?: boolean }\\n```\\n\\n`redactArgs` 策略（**誠實邊界**：需求#3 未指定，此為設計選擇）：\\n- key 名 regex `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` → 值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`。\\n- 其餘值保留（含路徑）。\\n- ⚠️ **已知限制（不合約化）**：黑名單擋不住「值本身是 secret 但 key 名無關鍵字」者，\\n  例如 `shell` 的 `command: \\\"curl -H 'Bearer sk-xxx'\\\"`。\\n  **Phase 1 緩解**：對 `name === \\\"shell\\\"` 且 `args.command` 為字串者，額外跑 value-level regex\\n  把 `Bearer\\\\s+\\\\S+` / `-p\\\\S+` / `(key|token|secret)=\\\\S+` 片段替成 `[REDACTED]`。\\n  此為 best-effort，**不寫成 [testable] 綠燈契約**（修方案 2 BC-6 把洩漏合約化的缺陷）；\\n  殘留洩漏風險由「observations.jsonl 與 events.jsonl 同信任域、本機 memoryDir、未外傳」承擔。\\n\\n### 2.2 `src/provider/tool-loop.ts`（既有 · Tier B 埋點 + loop-local 序列）\\n\\n- `runToolLoop`（:77–176）內新增 loop-local `const recentToolNames: string[] = []`（緊鄰 :85 `recentCalls`）。\\n  每 iteration 在 `executeToolCalls` **之後**，把該 iteration 實際發起的 toolCalls 名稱 push 進去\\n  （`for (const tc of toolCalls) recentToolNames.push(tc.function.name)`）。\\n  → 這是 Tier B `precedingTools` 的唯一來源，**loop-local、逐 iteration 累積、不經 session**（F1 修正）。\\n- `executeToolCalls`（:199–252）每個 task 內：\\n  - 在 RTK rewrite（:221）**之前**快照原始 args：`const origArgs = { ...args }`（F5 修正）。\\n  - **try 分支**（:225–240，成功）與 **catch 分支**（:241–245，失敗）**都**呼叫\\n    `recordRichObservation`（catch 分支帶 `isError:true`、`output: errMsg`）——修致命#4\\n    「Direct 失敗 tool 雙漏」。\\n  - 傳入：`{ source:\\\"rich\\\", name, args:origArgs, output(未截斷,observer 端截), isError,\\n    precedingTools: precedingSnapshot, precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"exec-order\\\", sessionId, chatId }`。\\n  - `precedingSnapshot` = `executeToolCalls` 進入時的 `recentToolNames` 副本（由新增 opts 欄位傳入，見下）。\\n- `ToolLoopOptions`（:61–71）新增**純資料**可選欄位（非回呼）：\\n  `observe?: { sessionId: string; chatId?: number }`。precedingTools 不走 opts（它 loop-local 自給），\\n  opts 只補 observer 需要但 loop 內拿不到的 `sessionId/chatId`。\\n  - 由 `direct.ts:121` 呼叫端注入 `observe`。**但** `direct.ts` 無 session（F1）→ sessionId 用\\n    DirectProvider 既有的 `this`-scope 值。**誠實邊界**：`prompt()` 內目前唯一可得的穩定識別是\\n    `initialize()` 回傳的 `direct-${Date.now()}`（:93），但它未存成欄位。\\n    **設計回應**：DirectProvider 新增 `private _sessionId = \\\"\\\"`，在 `initialize()`(:93) 賦值，\\n    `prompt()` 注入 `observe:{ sessionId: this._sessionId }`（chatId 在 Direct 不可得 → 省略，\\n    observer 以 optional 容錯）。此為 §因果鏈 C2 的連動點。\\n\\n### 2.3 `src/sessionManager.ts`（既有 · Tier A 埋點 + 新欄位 + resetTurn）\\n\\n- `ChatSession` 介面（:54–131）新增 `_recentToolNames?: string[]`（F8；optional 不破壞 create）。\\n- `tool_call` case（:363–372）：解析出 `title` 後，`(session._recentToolNames ??= []).push(title)`，\\n  push 後 `slice(-(N+1))` 取最近 N+marker（N 建議 5）。**僅維護於此一處 push**（避免方案 1\\n  「tool_call + update 兩處 push 重複計數」的自相矛盾）。\\n- `tool_call_update` case（:373–405）：在既有 `logEvent` 之後，**僅當 `session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\"`** 時：\\n  - completed（:383 區段）後呼叫 `recordSeqObservation({ source:\\\"seq\\\", name:toolName, status:\\\"completed\\\",\\n    sessionId:session.sessionId, chatId:session.chatId, precedingTools: session._recentToolNames ?? [],\\n    precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\" })`。\\n  - failed（:390 區段）同理帶 `status:\\\"failed\\\"`。\\n  - Direct 路徑（activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"）在此 **完全跳過 seq**（rich 由 Tier B 接手）→ BC-1。\\n  - 緊鄰呼叫即可（observer 已 fail-silent，**不加二層 try/catch**——修方案 2 過度設計 dead defensive code）。\\n- `resetTurn`（:412–421）：新增一行 `if (session._recentToolNames) session._recentToolNames.push(\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\")`\\n  （turn 邊界 marker，F9 / 致命#3）。**不清空陣列。**\\n\\n### 2.4 `docs/post-tool-hooks-proposal.html`（既有 · 文件更新）\\n\\n把方案 B 段落改寫為「Tier A/B 雙層 observer（Phase 1）+ instinct-evolve analyzer（Phase 2）」終局；\\n標注 ACP 萃取天花板與「Phase 2 才接 SKILL_PROPOSE」。**本輪屬文件，非承重路徑，可在實作後一併更新。**\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 3. BC-x 行為契約（可驗證 · 編號）\\n\\n> 標 `[testable]` 者 Phase 1 內須有自動化測試；`[deferred-Phase2]` 者本輪只在 schema 預留欄位、不實作邏輯。\\n\\n- **BC-1 [testable]**：同一 Direct（`activeProvider !== \\\"acp\\\"`）tool call 只產生 **1 筆**\\n  `source:\\\"rich\\\"` observation，Tier A 對該路徑**不**寫 seq。\\n  驗法：mock `activeProvider=\\\"anthropic\\\"`，跑一次 `executeToolCalls`（含一個成功 tool）+ 對應\\n  `tool_call_update completed`，斷言 `observations.jsonl` 只產生 **1 筆** `source:\\\"seq\\\"`\\n  observation（含 name/status/precedingTools，**無** args/output），且 `precedingToolsSemantics===\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"`。\\n  驗法：mock `activeProvider=\\\"acp\\\"` 觸發 `tool_call_update completed`，斷言只寫 1 行 seq、無 `args` 欄位、\\n  semantics 為 completion-order-approx。\\n  （ACP 路徑物理上不經 `executeToolCalls`〔F4〕∴ rich 必為 0，無需另測「ACP 無 rich」這種驗未執行碼的空契約。）\\n\\n- **BC-3 [deferred-Phase2]**：local-llm 不可用時 analyzer 不丟例外、seq 走純統計、rich 安靜略過。\\n  Phase 1 不實作 analyzer；僅確保 schema 帶 `source` 供 Phase 2 分流。標 Phase 2 驗證項。\\n\\n- **BC-4 [deferred-Phase2]**：confidence≥0.5 & occurrences≥5 才 propose。Phase 1 不實作；\\n  僅確保每筆 observation 帶 `ts`+`sessionId`+`name` 供 Phase 2 聚合計數。\\n\\n- **BC-5 [framework-dependent][testable]**：observations 寫入失敗**不中斷** tool loop / session。\\n  驗法：stub `appendFileSync` 拋 Error，斷言 `recordRichObservation`/`recordSeqObservation` 不向上拋、\\n  回傳 void；且 `executeToolCalls` 正常回傳 results、`applyUpdate` 正常完成、`session.onUpdate` 仍觸發。\\n\\n- **BC-6 [testable]**：每筆 observation 含 schema 欄位 `{ts, source, name, sessionId, precedingTools,\\n  precedingToolsSemantics}`；rich 額外含 `{args, output, isError}`；且 `redactArgs` 對 key 名命中\\n  `/token|key|secret|password|authorization|auth/i` 的值替為 `\\\"[REDACTED]\\\"`，路徑類值保留。\\n  驗法：餵 `{command:\\\"ls /home\\\", apiKey:\\\"sk-xxx\\\"}` 斷言 `apiKey` 被 redact、`command` 保留。\\n  ⚠️ 本契約**只驗「key 名黑名單有效」**，**不宣稱「無洩漏」**（誠實邊界 §2.1）。\\n\\n- **BC-7 [testable]**：rich observation 記到的 `name`/`args.command` 是 **RTK rewrite 前**的原始值（F5）。\\n  驗法：設 `RTK_SHELL_REWRITE=1`，餵 `shell {command:\\\"git turn 工具名與本 turn 之間含 turn 邊界 marker（F9）。\\n  驗法：turn1 跑 toolA → `resetTurn` → turn2 跑 toolB，斷言 toolB 的 seq observation `precedingTools`\\n  序列中 toolA 與 toolB 之間存在 `\\\"\\u0000TURN\\u0000\\\"`。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 4. 因果鏈分析（既有連動點 · grep 呼叫者窮舉）\\n\\n### C1 — `sessionManager.applyUpdate`（Tier A 埋點）\\n- **根因**：兩路徑 tool 完成事件的天然匯流點，要在此就 ACP 路徑寫 seq observation。\\n- **呼叫者（grep）**：唯一註冊點 `sessionManager.ts:228 provider.on(\\\"update\\\", ...=>applyUpdate(session,u))`，\\n  ACP+Direct 兩 provider 共用此一條（F2）。→ 影響**每個 session 的每次 tool 完成事件**。\\n- **隱性風險**：寫入例外若冒泡 → 中斷整條 SessionUpdate 流 → 全 session 凍結。\\n- **決策**：`recordSeqObservation` 內部 fail-silent（BC-5）為**硬要求**；呼叫處不加二層 try/catch。\\n  僅 ACP 分支進入（`activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"`），Direct 在此 0 寫入（BC-1）。\\n\\n### C2 — `tool-loop.executeToolCalls` + `runToolLoop`（Tier B 埋點）\\n- **根因**：rich 訊號（args/output/isError）只在此 scope 完整且未截斷（F4）。\\n- **呼叫者（grep 窮舉）**：`executeToolCalls` 唯一呼叫者 = `runToolLoop`（tool-loop.ts:134）；\\n  `runToolLoop` 唯一生產呼叫點 = `direct.ts:121`（DirectProvider.prompt）。\\n  → 呼叫鏈**不擴散到 ACP**（ACP adapter 不 import runToolLoop）。\\n- **`ToolLoopOptions` 呼叫者（grep）**：唯一生產使用點 `direct.ts:121`；新增 `observe?` 為 optional\\n  → 不破壞既有 `onText/onThinking/onToolStart/onToolEnd` 呼叫（向後相容）。\\n- **DirectProvider 連動（F1 修正引入）**：新增 `private _sessionId`，賦值點 `initialize()`(:93)，\\n  讀取點 `prompt()`(:121)。`_sessionId` 在 initialize 前為 `\\\"\\\"`；prompt 一定在 initialize 後呼叫\\n  （SessionManager.create :252 先 await initialize 才 set session）→ 無空值風險。\\n- **隱性風險**：只讀不寫 `results`/`messages` → 對 messages 注入、CodeGraph enrichment(:229–232)\\n  的 truncation 語意**零影響**（印證去 mutate 野心）。`ToolResult` 介面(:194–197) 不動。\\n- **決策**：rich observation 在 try **與** catch 分支都寫（致命#4）；args 取 RTK 前原始副本（F5/BC-7）。\\n\\n### C3 — `ChatSession` 介面 + `resetTurn`（新欄位 `_recentToolNames`）\\n- **根因**：Tier A `precedingTools` 需純工具名序列，既有無此狀態（F8）。\\n- **呼叫者/讀寫點（grep 窮舉）**：\\n  - 宣告：`ChatSession`(:54–131) 新增 optional 欄位 → `create`(:198–226) 物件字面量不需改（undefined 容錯）。\\n  - **唯一 push 維護點**：`tool_call` case(:367 區段)。\\n  - **讀取點**：`tool_call_update` case(:383/:394，僅 ACP 分支)。\\n  - **turn 邊界**：`resetTurn`(:412–421) — **此處是致命#3 的因果鏈漏接點**，必須 push marker\\n    （不清空）。grep `resetTurn` 呼叫者確認其為每 turn 重置入口（被 run-prompt 在 turn 起始呼叫）。\\n- **決策**：採 marker 不清空（F9 理由）；push 僅一處（不重複計數）。\\n\\n### C4 — 既有 `logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\",...)` / `getToolUsageStats`（零衝突確認）\\n- seq observation 寫**獨立** `observations.jsonl`，event-log 寫 `events.jsonl`（F7）。\\n  二者不同檔、不互相覆寫、不競態。Tier A 在 `logEvent` 之後執行，不取代它。\\n\\n### C5 — `skill-suggest.ts` / `SKILL_PROPOSE` / preamble（Phase 1 不觸碰確認）\\n- grep 確認本輪改動不 import/呼叫 `skill-suggest`、不產 `SKILL_PROPOSE` token、不 rebuild preamble\\n  → 不踩 `POLICIES/preamble-frozen-snapshot.md`。Phase 2 才接。\\n\\n---\\n\\n## 5. 取捨與風險\\n\\n### 取捨\\n1. **獨立 `observations.jsonl` vs 擴充 event-log**（需求#2）：選獨立檔。\\n   - 理由：rich schema（巢狀 args/output/precedingTools）與 event-log 扁平 `{type,payload}` 不合；\\n     Phase 2 可單獨 rotate observations 不污染 30 天 event 滾動。\\n   - 代價：另一份檔案的生命週期。**Phase 1 用 size cap 兜底**（§2.1），不接受「30 天可滾動」的不存在前提\\n     （修方案 2/3 把不存在的 rotate 當前提）。\\n2. **路徑分流去重（BC-1）vs analyzer 端 dedup**：選路徑分流（簡單、無共享狀態），\\n   正確性綁 `activeProvider===\\\"acp\\\"` 判別——已 A 級驗證可靠（F3）。\\n   退路保留但 Phase 1 不啟用：schema 帶 `source`，若日後判別不可靠可改 analyzer 端 dedup。\\n3. **`precedingTools` loop-local（Tier B）vs session 欄位（Tier A）**：兩路徑來源不同。\\n   Tier B 走 runToolLoop loop-local（F1 強制如此，且順帶解陳舊快照問題）；\\n   Tier A 走 `session._recentToolNames`（ACP 無 loop 可借）。語意差異由 `precedingToolsSemantics` 標注。\\n4. **脫敏黑名單 + shell value-level regex**：best-effort，不合約化（§2.1 / BC-6）。\\n5. **output hard cap 自帶 8KB**：不借 undefined 的 `maxToolResultChars`（F5 風險）。需求未指定，設計選擇。\\n\\n### 風險（誠實評估）\\n- 🔴 **R-A：ACP 萃取天花板（需求#5 核心誠實評估）**。ACP 在 `tool_call_update`（完成事件）寫入，\\n  ACP 進程外並行跑 tool 時 update 到達序 = **完成序非發起序**，與 agent 真實意圖序列無關。\\n  ∴ Tier A 的 combo 訊號**先天受限**，`precedingToolsSemantics:\\\"completion-order-approx\\\"` 已顯式標注\\n  讓 Phase 2 不把它當 exec-order 用（避免#003「正確放大錯前提」）。\\n  **價值定位**：「兩者都用」中 Tier A 價值偏低，主要價值在 Tier B rich。但埋點成本極低\\n  （1 行條件 + 1 個 ring buffer push + marker），且使用者明確要求兩路徑都做 → Phase 1 保留 Tier A 合理；\\n  若 Phase 2 證實 ACP seq 噪音過大，可降級為純佔位而不影響 Tier B。**沉沒成本可接受。**\\n- 🟡 **R-B：分期策略（需求#4）**。Phase 1 只養資料、Phase 2 才 analyzer，低風險先行**合理**。\\n   <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\src\\\\event-log.ts\",\"content\":\"/**\\n * Event Log — 狀態轉移持久化記錄\\n * \\n * 可查、可審計、可回放。30 天滾動清理。\\n */\\n\\nimport { appendFileSync, existsSync, readFileSync, writeFileSync, mkdirSync } from \\\"fs\\\";\\nimport { dirname, join } from \\\"path\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\n\\n// ─── Types ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nexport type EventType =\\n  | \\\"session_start\\\"\\n  | \\\"session_end\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_start\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_step\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_done\\\"\\n  | \\\"goal_cancel\\\"\\n  | \\\"specialist_spawn\\\"\\n  | \\\"specialist_done\\\"\\n  | \\\"scheduler_fire\\\"\\n  | \\\"tool_call\\\"\\n  | \\\"error\\\";\\n\\nexport interface StateEvent {\\n  ts: string;\\n  type: EventType;\\n  chatId?: number;\\n  userId?: number;\\n  payload: Record<string, unknown>;\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Config ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\nconst EVENT_LOG_PATH = join(config.memoryDir, \\\"events.jsonl\\\");\\nconst RETENTION_DAYS = 30;\\n\\n// ─── Core Functions ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\n\\n/**\\n * 寫入一筆 event\\n */\\nexport function logEvent(\\n  type: EventType,\\n  payload: Record<string, unknown> = {},\\n  opts: { chatId?: number; userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n    const events = lines\\n      .slice(-n)\\n      .map((line) => {\\n        try {\\n          return JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        } catch {\\n          return null;\\n        }\\n      })\\n      .filter((e): e is StateEvent => e !== null);\\n\\n    return events;\\n  } catch {\\n    return [];\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定類型的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByType(type: EventType, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.type === type).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定 chat 的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByChat(chatId: number, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.chatId === chatId).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 滾動清理：刪除超過 RETENTION_DAYS 的 events\\n * \\n * 建議在 /dream 時呼叫\\n */\\nexport function rotateEventLog(): { deleted: number; kept: number } {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) {\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n\\n    const cutoff = new Date();\\n    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - RETENTION_DAYS);\\n    const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n    const kept: string[] = [];\\n    let deleted = 0;\\n\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      try {\\n        const event = JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        if (event.ts >= cutoffStr) {\\n          kept.push(line);\\n        } else {\\n          deleted++;\\n        }\\n      } catch {\\n        // 無法解析的行直接丟棄\\n        deleted++;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    writeFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, kept.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + (kept.length ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\"), \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n\\n    return { deleted, kept: kept.length };\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to rotate:\\\", err);\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 統計過去 days 天的 tool_call 使用次數，依工具名稱聚合。\\n *\\n * 回傳依使用次數由多到少排序的陣列；total 為總呼叫數、failed 為失敗數。\\n */\\nexport function getToolUsageStats(days: number = 7): {\\n  byTool: Array<{ name: string; total: number; failed: number }>;\\n  total: number;\\n  failed: number;\\n} {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n  const counts = new Map<string, { total: number; failed: number }>();\\n  let total = 0;\\n  let failed = 0;\\n\\n  for (const e of getRecentEvents(10000)) {\\n    if (e.type !== \\\"tool_call\\\" || e.ts < cutoffStr) continue;\\n    const name = (e.payload?.name as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n    const isFail = e.payload?.status === \\\"failed\\\";\\n    const cur = counts.get(name) ?? { total: 0, failed: 0 };\\n    cur.total++;\\n    if (isFail) cur.failed++;\\n    counts.set(name, cur);\\n    total++;\\n    if (isFail) failed++;\\n  }\\n\\n  const byTool = [...counts.entries()]\\n    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, total: v.total, failed: v.failed }))\\n    .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total);\\n\\n  return { byTool, total, failed };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 取得 event log 統計\\n */\\nexport function getEventLogStats(): {\\n  totalEvents: number;\\n  oldestEvent?: string;\\n  newestEvent?: string;\\n  byType: Record<string, number>;\\n} {\\n  const events = getRecentEvents(10000); // 讀取全部（最多 10000）\\n\\n  if (events.length === 0) {\\n    return { totalEvents: 0, byType: {} };\\n  }\\n\\n  const byType: Record<string, number> = {};\\n  for (const e of events) {\\n    byType[e.type] = (byType[e.type] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    totalEvents: events.length,\\n    oldestEvent: events[0]?.ts,\\n    newestEvent: events[events.length - 1]?.ts,\\n    byType,\\n  };\\n}\\n\",\"numLines\":218,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":218}}"</outcome>

This is the final synthesized design specification that merged the YAGNI base with adversarial fixes. The document is highly detailed and includes:

1. **Section 0: 事實求證 (Fact Verification)** - 9 fact claims (F1-F9) with A-grade/B-grade evidence, including a critical finding (F1) that overturned all three proposals' shared assumption that DirectProvider could access session objects
2. **Section 1: Goals** - Clear Phase 1 objectives and explicit non-goals (YAGNI)
3. **Section 2: Modules** - 4 modules including new tool-observer.ts, modifications to tool-loop.ts, sessionManager.ts, and direct.ts
4. **Section 3: Behavior Contracts** - 8 testable behavior contracts (BC-1 through BC-8)
5. **Section 4: Causal Chain Analysis** - 5 causal chain sections (C1-C5) mapping caller/callee relationships
6. **Section 5: Trade-offs and Risks** - Honest assessment of design trade-offs and 4 risk levels
7. **Section 6: Learning Query Results** - Application of historical warning patterns from 問題追蹤.md
8. **Section 7: Implementation Scope** - Clear Phase 1 deliverables and Phase 2 deferrals

Key design decisions documented:
- Dual-tier observer pattern (Tier A for ACP seq, Tier B for Direct rich)
- Loop-local precedingTools accumulation (fixing multi-iteration staleness)
- Turn boundary markers instead of clearing (fixing cross-turn pollution)
- Independent observations.jsonl with 32MB size cap
- Semantic annotation for ACP completion-order vs execution-order
- Args redaction with best-effort shell command sanitization

The specification includes 8 testable behavior contracts that define observable outcomes, making this a production-ready design specification ready for Phase 1 implementation.

<observation>
  <type>decision</type>
  <title>P1 Design Specification Completed for Tool-Usage Observer Phase 1</title>
  <subtitle>371-line comprehensive design spec synthesized with YAGNI base, 6 adversarial fixes, 9 verified fact claims, 8 behavior contracts, and critical DirectProvider session-access assumption reversal</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>P1-design-spec.md created at .claude-loop/artifacts/ as 371-line comprehensive Phase 1 implementation specification</fact>
    <fact>Section 0 contains 9 fact claims (F1-F9) with A-grade/B-grade evidence plus counterexample checks following 問題追蹤.md patterns #003/#004/#005</fact>
    <fact>F1 overturned critical shared assumption: DirectProvider.prompt() has no session object access (A-grade evidence from direct.ts:98 signature and emitUpdate using hardcoded sessionId:"direct"), forcing precedingTools to use loop-local accumulation instead of session field injection</fact>
    <fact>Module specifications define 4 components: new tool-observer.ts (single write gate with fail-silent, size cap, redactArgs), tool-loop.ts modifications (loop-local recentToolNames, try/catch both branches, RTK pre-snapshot), direct.ts additions (_sessionId field), sessionManager.ts changes (_recentToolNames field, ACP-only seq writing, resetTurn marker)</fact>
    <fact>Eight behavior contracts specified (BC-1 through BC-8): BC-1 Direct produces 1 rich only, BC-1a precedingTools reflects exec-order from loop-local, BC-2 ACP produces 1 seq with completion-order-approx semantics, BC-5 fail-silent never interrupts, BC-7 RTK pre-rewrite capture, BC-8 turn boundary markers prevent cross-turn pollution</fact>
    <fact>Observation schema includes precedingToolsSemantics field with "exec-order" vs "completion-order-approx" to prevent Phase 2 analyzer from incorrectly treating ACP completion order as causal execution order</fact>
    <fact>Five causal chain sections (C1-C5) document ripple impacts with grep-verified caller enumeration: C1 applyUpdate affects every tool completion event, C2 executeToolCalls chain limited to DirectProvider only, C3 resetTurn identified as fatal-flaw-3 missing link requiring turn marker not clearing</fact>
    <fact>Risk assessment includes R-A acknowledging ACP extraction ceiling (completion-order not invocation-order, low value but acceptable sunk cost), R-B recommending ≤30-line throwaway validation script before Phase 1 landing, R-C accepting residual redaction leakage for local memoryDir trust domain</fact>
    <fact>Learning query results document application of historical warning patterns: #003/#004/#005 for fact claims requiring A-grade evidence, #007 for cross-source validation via judge-panel+skeptic adversarial process, recommending /dev-review for BC-1a/BC-7/BC-8 post-implementation</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>The primary session completed synthesis of P1-design-spec.md, a comprehensive 371-line Phase 1 implementation specification that merges YAGNI (simplicity-first) base architecture with runner-up strengths and all adversarial fixes. The specification opens with Section 0 containing 9 meticulously verified fact claims (F1-F9) following 問題追蹤.md historical warning patterns for cognitive fact assertions, with each claim graded A-level or B-level plus counterexample checks. The most critical finding is F1, which overturned a fundamental assumption shared by all three competing proposals: DirectProvider cannot access session objects. The A-grade evidence came from direct.ts:98 showing `async prompt(text: string)` signature with no session parameter, and emitUpdate at line 173 using hardcoded `sessionId: "direct"` rather than real session IDs. This discovery invalidated all three proposals' approach of injecting precedingTools via session field or getRecentTools callback, forcing the design to pivot to loop-local accumulation within runToolLoop—which simultaneously resolved the multi-iteration staleness fatal flaw because the sequence lives within the loop and accumulates per-iteration. The specification defines 4 module modifications: new tool-observer.ts as single write convergence point with fail-silent error handling, 32MB size cap, args redaction, and output truncation; tool-loop.ts gaining loop-local recentToolNames array, RTK-pre-snapshot args capture, and try/catch both branches writing rich observations; direct.ts adding _sessionId private field for sessionId tracking; and sessionManager.ts adding _recentToolNames optional field, ACP-only conditional seq writing, and resetTurn turn-boundary marker injection. Eight behavior contracts (BC-1 through BC-8) specify testable requirements including Direct producing exactly 1 rich observation, ACP producing exactly 1 seq observation with completion-order-approx semantics, fail-silent never interrupting tool loops or sessions, RTK pre-rewrite value capture, and turn markers preventing cross-turn combo pollution. The observation schema includes precedingToolsSemantics field explicitly annotating whether precedingTools reflects execution-order (Tier B Direct) or completion-order-approx (Tier A ACP) to prevent Phase 2 analyzer from treating ACP's completion sequence as causal execution order—directly addressing historical warning pattern #003 "correctly amplifying wrong premises." Five causal chain sections (C1-C5) document ripple impacts with grep-verified caller exhaustive enumeration: C1 identifies sessionManager.applyUpdate affecting every tool completion event for every session making fail-silent a hard requirement, C2 traces executeToolCalls→runToolLoop→direct.ts:121 confirming call chain never reaches ACP, C3 identifies resetTurn as the fatal-flaw-3 missing link requiring turn marker injection rather than clearing to avoid breaking "recent N tools" semantics while preventing cross-turn pollution. The specification includes honest risk assessment: R-A acknowledges ACP extraction ceiling where parallel tool completion order doesn't reflect invocation order making Tier A combo signals inherently limited but accepting the sunk cost due to low implementation cost and user explicit requirement for both paths; R-B recommends running ≤30-line throwaway validation script reading real observations to verify schema can cluster ≥1 reasonable signal before Phase 1 landing (not blocking PR but gating Phase 2); R-C accepts residual args redaction leakage for shell commands with embedded secrets given local memoryDir trust domain. Learning query results document proper application of historical warning patterns from 問題追蹤.md: patterns #003/#004/#005 requiring A-grade evidence for fact claims were satisfied via Section 0's file:line citations plus counterexample checks, pattern #007 requiring cross-source validation for cognitive outputs was satisfied via judge-panel+skeptic adversarial process inheritance, with recommendation to run /dev-review post-implementation for skeptic re-verification of BC-1a/BC-7/BC-8 (the three highest-risk contracts). The specification concludes with clear Phase 1 scope (tool-observer.ts new file, tool-loop/direct/sessionManager modifications, BC-1/1a/2/5/6/7/8 test coverage) and explicit Phase 2 deferrals (analyzer, observations rotation, SKILL_PROPOSE wiring, BC-3/BC-4 analyzer-dependent contracts). This deliverable represents the culmination of the four-phase dev-design workflow: Explore verified code reality, Propose generated competing architectures, Adversarial identified fatal flaws, and Synthesize merged winning approach with fixes while respecting historical mistake patterns.</narrative>

    <concept>gotcha</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

</observation>
